# EffectLab — Full Effect Reference for LLMs

> A curated showcase of visual effects for React. Each effect links to its original library.

> Total effects: 100

---

## Animated Glow

- **Slug**: rn-animated-glow
- **Category**: glow
- **Description**: Multi-layer animated glow with presets (Rainbow, Ocean Sunset). Web recreation of react-native-animated-glow which uses Skia under the hood.
- **Library**: react-native-animated-glow (react-native-animated-glow)
- **Library URL**: https://reactnativeglow.com/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 15 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 200
- **Weekly downloads**: 2000
- **Last updated**: 2025-03
- **Tags**: glow, border, gradient, animation, skia, preset, interactive
- **Keywords**: animated glow, multi-layer glow, glow preset, rainbow glow, ocean sunset glow, skia glow, react native glow, glow border, rotating gradient border, neon glow, custom glow colors, hover glow state, press glow state, interactive glow, glow layers, glow behind, glow infront, button glow, card glow effect, premium glow, animated border glow, multi-color glow, gradient glow border, apple style glow, ios glow, performant glow, 글로우 이펙트, 애니메이션 글로우, 무지개 글로우, 네온 글로우, 글로우 프리셋, 보더 글로우, Skia 글로우, conic-gradient, css glow, web glow effect

### Install
```bash
bun add react-native-animated-glow
```

### Usage
```tsx
// React Native usage (requires RN + Skia)
import { AnimatedGlow, glowPresets } from 'react-native-animated-glow';

export default function Example() {
  return (
    <AnimatedGlow
      preset={glowPresets.defaultRainbow}
      initialState="default"
      style={{ borderRadius: 30 }}
    >
      <Text>Glowing Button</Text>
    </AnimatedGlow>
  );
}

// Web alternative (CSS recreation):
// See the demo component for a pure CSS version
// that recreates the glow presets for web projects.
```

---

## Siri Orb

- **Slug**: siri-orb
- **Category**: orb
- **Description**: Animated Siri-style audio visualizer orb with reactive wave animations and glowing effects. Built with CSS conic-gradients and blend modes.
- **Library**: Smooth UI (smoothui-cli)
- **Library URL**: https://smoothui.dev/docs/components/siri-orb
- **Install type**: cli
- **Bundle size**: 8.9 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 500
- **Weekly downloads**: 5000
- **Last updated**: 2025-02
- **Tags**: orb, siri, apple, gradient, conic, animation, glow, glass
- **Keywords**: floating sphere, glowing ball, energy orb, plasma ball, layered gradient sphere, glass orb, luminous sphere, rotating color ball, magical orb, crystal ball effect, ambient light ball, aurora sphere, holographic orb, ai assistant avatar, voice assistant indicator, loading orb, music visualizer, status indicator, ai thinking animation, chat bot avatar, virtual assistant ui, smart speaker ui, processing indicator, ambient decoration, siri animation, apple siri, homepod animation, ios siri effect, voice ui, conversational ai ui, 시리 오브, 시리 애니메이션, 글로우 구체, 에너지 볼, AI 어시스턴트, 음성 비서 UI, 로딩 인디케이터, css @property, conic-gradient layers, blend mode, prefers-reduced-motion, accessible animation

### Install
```bash
npx smoothui-cli add siri-orb
```

### Usage
```tsx
import SiriOrb from "@/components/ui/smoothui/siri-orb";

export default function Example() {
  return (
    <SiriOrb
      size="192px"
      colors={{
        bg: "oklch(10% 0.02 264.695)",
        c1: "oklch(75% 0.15 350)",    // Pastel pink
        c2: "oklch(80% 0.12 200)",    // Pastel blue
        c3: "oklch(78% 0.14 280)",    // Pastel purple
      }}
      animationDuration={20}
    />
  );
}
```

---

## 3D Shader Gradient

- **Slug**: shader-gradient
- **Category**: gradient
- **Description**: Stunning 3D mesh gradients powered by WebGL shaders. Create animated, interactive gradient backgrounds with water, plane, and sphere styles reminiscent of Apple's design language.
- **Library**: @shadergradient/react (@shadergradient/react)
- **Library URL**: https://shadergradient.co
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: ~150 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 5200
- **Weekly downloads**: 15000
- **Last updated**: 2024-11
- **Tags**: gradient, 3d, shader, mesh, webgl, three.js, background
- **Keywords**: mesh gradient, 3d gradient, shader gradient, apple style gradient, animated gradient background, webgl gradient, three.js gradient, gradient mesh, gradient animation, gradient shader, 3d mesh gradient, animated mesh gradient, dynamic gradient, gradient background, glass gradient, liquid gradient, waterplane gradient, sphere gradient, fluid gradient, organic gradient, flowing gradient, iridescent gradient, holographic gradient, aurora gradient, smooth gradient, hero background, landing page gradient, app background, website gradient, card gradient, interactive background, immersive background, premium background, modern background, 메쉬 그라디언트, 3D 그라디언트, 셰이더 그라디언트, 애플 스타일 그라디언트, 애니메이션 배경, WebGL 그라디언트, 그라디언트 배경, 유체 그라디언트, 홀로그래픽 그라디언트, 인터랙티브 배경, @shadergradient/react, ShaderGradient, ShaderGradientCanvas, waterPlane, three.js mesh gradient, react three fiber gradient

### Install
```bash
bun add @shadergradient/react
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { ShaderGradientCanvas, ShaderGradient } from "@shadergradient/react";

export default function ShaderGradientDemo() {
  return (
    <div className="w-full h-64 rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
      <ShaderGradientCanvas>
        <ShaderGradient
          type="waterPlane"
          animate="on"
          uTime={0.2}
          uSpeed={0.4}
          uStrength={2}
          uDensity={1.2}
          uFrequency={5.5}
          color1="#ff5005"
          color2="#dbba95"
          color3="#d0bce1"
        />
      </ShaderGradientCanvas>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Glow Particles

- **Slug**: pixi-glow-particles
- **Category**: particle
- **Description**: Floating, pulsing particles with glow halos rendered via PixiJS WebGL. High-performance 2D particle system with smooth animations.
- **Library**: PixiJS (pixi.js)
- **Library URL**: https://pixijs.com/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 150 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 44000
- **Weekly downloads**: 500000
- **Last updated**: 2025-03
- **Tags**: particle, glow, webgl, pixi, animation, ambient, background
- **Keywords**: floating particles, glow particles, particle field, ambient particles, constellation effect, star field, firefly effect, floating lights, particle background, webgl particles, gpu particles, pixi.js effect, 2d webgl, canvas particle, html5 canvas, hero background particles, landing page particles, ambient decoration, interactive background, dark mode particles, space particles, glowing dots, pulsing lights, bokeh effect, soft glow dots, particle system, skia web alternative, high performance animation, 60fps animation, gpu accelerated, 파티클 이펙트, 글로우 파티클, 배경 파티클, 떠다니는 빛, WebGL 파티클, 캔버스 파티클, Skia 대안, pixi.js, webgl, canvas 2d, gpu rendering

### Install
```bash
bun add pixi.js
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";
import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";

export default function GlowParticles() {
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    let app: any;
    async function init() {
      const PIXI = await import("pixi.js");
      if (!containerRef.current) return;

      app = new PIXI.Application();
      await app.init({
        resizeTo: containerRef.current,
        backgroundAlpha: 0,
        antialias: true,
      });
      containerRef.current.appendChild(app.canvas);

      const COLORS = [0x8b5cf6, 0xec4899, 0x3b82f6];
      for (let i = 0; i < 40; i++) {
        const gfx = new PIXI.Graphics();
        const color = COLORS[Math.floor(Math.random() * COLORS.length)];
        const r = 2 + Math.random() * 6;

        gfx.circle(0, 0, r * 4).fill({ color, alpha: 0.15 });
        gfx.circle(0, 0, r).fill({ color, alpha: 0.8 });
        gfx.x = Math.random() * app.screen.width;
        gfx.y = Math.random() * app.screen.height;
        app.stage.addChild(gfx);
      }
    }
    init();
    return () => app?.destroy(true);
  }, []);

  return <div ref={containerRef} className="w-full h-full" />;
}
```

---

## Layout Animation

- **Slug**: framer-layout
- **Category**: layout
- **Description**: Smooth layout animations powered by Motion (Framer). Cards expand, collapse, and reflow with spring-based transitions using layoutId and the layout prop.
- **Library**: Motion (Framer) (motion)
- **Library URL**: https://motion.dev
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 45 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 25000
- **Weekly downloads**: 5000000
- **Last updated**: 2025-03
- **Tags**: layout, animation, transition, framer, motion, gesture, spring
- **Keywords**: layout animation, framer motion, shared layout, expand collapse, reflow animation, react animation, layout transition, smooth reflow, card expand, grid animation, spring animation, layout shift, animate layout, motion layout, framer layout, auto animate, expanding cards, collapsing cards, smooth grid, card reflow, animated grid, fluid layout, resize animation, layout morph, shared element transition, dashboard cards, expandable list, photo gallery expand, accordion animation, masonry animation, card detail view, list to detail, grid reorder, drag reorder animation, 레이아웃 애니메이션, 프레이머 모션, 카드 확장, 그리드 애니메이션, 부드러운 전환, 레이아웃 전환, 카드 접기 펼치기, 스프링 애니메이션, 리플로우 효과, 공유 레이아웃, 모션 애니메이션, motion, AnimatePresence, layoutId, layout prop, framer-motion, motion component

### Install
```bash
bun add motion
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "motion/react";

const cards = [
  { id: 1, color: "bg-blue-500", label: "Card A" },
  { id: 2, color: "bg-emerald-500", label: "Card B" },
  { id: 3, color: "bg-amber-500", label: "Card C" },
  { id: 4, color: "bg-rose-500", label: "Card D" },
];

export default function LayoutAnimation() {
  const [expandedId, setExpandedId] = useState<number | null>(null);

  return (
    <div className="relative w-full max-w-md mx-auto">
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
        {cards.map((card) => (
          <motion.div
            key={card.id}
            layoutId={`card-${card.id}`}
            onClick={() =>
              setExpandedId(expandedId === card.id ? null : card.id)
            }
            className={`${card.color} rounded-xl cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center text-white font-semibold ${
              expandedId === card.id
                ? "col-span-2 h-40"
                : "h-20"
            }`}
            transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
          >
            <motion.span layout="position">{card.label}</motion.span>
          </motion.div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Spring Physics Animation

- **Slug**: react-spring
- **Category**: transition
- **Description**: Physics-based spring animations that feel natural and alive. Stagger cards, bounce elements, and create fluid transitions powered by real spring dynamics.
- **Library**: react-spring (@react-spring/web)
- **Library URL**: https://react-spring.dev
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 16.3 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 28000
- **Weekly downloads**: 1200000
- **Last updated**: 2024-10
- **Tags**: spring, physics, animation, transition, gesture, stagger
- **Keywords**: spring animation, physics animation, bounce animation, stagger animation, trail animation, react animation library, spring physics, physics-based animation, natural animation, elastic animation, spring transition, bounce in, spring motion, fluid animation, organic animation, spring effect, physics motion, dynamic animation, bouncing cards, staggered entrance, sliding cards, cascading animation, sequential entrance, spring bounce, elastic entrance, wobbly animation, springy cards, card entrance, list animation, staggered list, page transition, mount animation, entrance effect, reveal animation, animated layout, motion design, interactive animation, gesture animation, drag animation, 스프링 애니메이션, 물리 애니메이션, 바운스 효과, 스태거 애니메이션, 트레일 애니메이션, 리액트 애니메이션, 탄성 애니메이션, 자연스러운 애니메이션, 물리 기반 효과, 카드 입장 효과, react-spring, @react-spring/web, useSpring, useTrail, animated.div, spring config, tension friction

### Install
```bash
bun add @react-spring/web
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState, useCallback } from "react";
import { useTrail, animated } from "@react-spring/web";

const items = ["Design", "Develop", "Deploy", "Deliver"];

export default function SpringTrail() {
  const [show, setShow] = useState(true);

  const trail = useTrail(items.length, {
    from: { opacity: 0, transform: "translateX(-40px)" },
    to: {
      opacity: show ? 1 : 0,
      transform: show ? "translateX(0px)" : "translateX(-40px)",
    },
    config: { mass: 1, tension: 200, friction: 20 },
  });

  const handleReset = useCallback(() => {
    setShow(false);
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      requestAnimationFrame(() => setShow(true));
    });
  }, []);

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
      {trail.map((style, i) => (
        <animated.div key={items[i]} style={style} className="rounded-xl border p-4">
          <p className="text-lg font-semibold">{items[i]}</p>
        </animated.div>
      ))}
      <button onClick={handleReset}>Reset</button>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Auto Animate

- **Slug**: auto-animate
- **Category**: layout
- **Description**: Zero-config automatic animations for adding, removing, and reordering list items. Drop-in smooth transitions with a single hook -- no keyframes or spring configs needed.
- **Library**: AutoAnimate (@formkit/auto-animate)
- **Library URL**: https://auto-animate.formkit.com
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 3.8 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 13000
- **Weekly downloads**: 350000
- **Last updated**: 2024-08
- **Tags**: auto, animate, list, transition, layout, reorder
- **Keywords**: automatic animation, list animation, add remove animate, layout transition, auto animate, automate animation, list reorder animation, smooth list, animated list, zero config animation, drop in animation, simple animation, layout animation, element animation, dom animation, auto transition, magic animation, effortless animation, smooth add remove, animated insert, animated delete, slide in animation, fade in list, reorder transition, shuffle animation, move animation, position animation, todo list animation, cart item animation, notification animation, table row animation, kanban animation, sortable list, dynamic list, crud animation, item transition, 자동 애니메이션, 리스트 애니메이션, 레이아웃 트랜지션, 요소 추가 애니메이션, 요소 삭제 애니메이션, 리스트 정렬 애니메이션, 자동 트랜지션, 간편 애니메이션, 드롭인 애니메이션, 리스트 효과, @formkit/auto-animate, useAutoAnimate, autoAnimate, formkit auto-animate, auto-animate react

### Install
```bash
bun add @formkit/auto-animate
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { useAutoAnimate } from "@formkit/auto-animate/react";

export default function AutoAnimateDemo() {
  const [items, setItems] = useState(["Apple", "Banana", "Cherry"]);
  const [parent] = useAutoAnimate();

  const addItem = () => {
    const fruits = ["Mango", "Grape", "Peach", "Kiwi", "Lemon", "Melon"];
    const pick = fruits[Math.floor(Math.random() * fruits.length)];
    setItems((prev) => [...prev, pick]);
  };

  const removeItem = (index: number) => {
    setItems((prev) => prev.filter((_, i) => i !== index));
  };

  const shuffle = () => {
    setItems((prev) => [...prev].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5));
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      <ul ref={parent} className="space-y-2">
        {items.map((item, i) => (
          <li
            key={item + i}
            className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 rounded-lg bg-white/10"
          >
            {item}
            <button onClick={() => removeItem(i)}>Remove</button>
          </li>
        ))}
      </ul>
      <div className="flex gap-2">
        <button onClick={addItem}>Add</button>
        <button onClick={shuffle}>Shuffle</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Scroll Parallax

- **Slug**: scroll-parallax
- **Category**: scroll
- **Description**: Multi-layer parallax scrolling effect where elements move at different speeds as you scroll, creating an immersive depth illusion. Powered by react-scroll-parallax.
- **Library**: react-scroll-parallax (react-scroll-parallax)
- **Library URL**: https://react-scroll-parallax.damnthat.tv
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 5.8 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 4200
- **Weekly downloads**: 200000
- **Last updated**: 2024-09
- **Tags**: parallax, scroll, animation, depth, layer, interactive
- **Keywords**: scroll parallax, parallax scrolling, depth effect, scroll animation, layered scroll, parallax effect, multi layer parallax, scroll depth, parallax layers, smooth parallax, scroll driven animation, parallax section, floating layers, depth illusion, layered movement, speed differential, foreground background, 3d scroll, immersive scroll, visual depth, moving layers, hero parallax, landing page parallax, storytelling scroll, portfolio parallax, product showcase scroll, scroll experience, onboarding scroll, narrative scroll, interactive scroll page, scroll reveal layers, scroll storytelling, immersive landing, 스크롤 패럴랙스, 패럴랙스 스크롤, 깊이 효과, 스크롤 애니메이션, 레이어 스크롤, 시차 효과, 패럴랙스 효과, 다층 스크롤, 스크롤 깊이감, 몰입형 스크롤, 시차 스크롤링, react-scroll-parallax, ParallaxProvider, Parallax component, parallax speed, scroll offset, parallax banner

### Install
```bash
bun add react-scroll-parallax
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { Parallax, ParallaxProvider } from "react-scroll-parallax";

export default function ScrollParallax() {
  return (
    <ParallaxProvider>
      <div className="relative h-96 overflow-y-auto rounded-xl bg-slate-900">
        <div className="h-[800px] relative">
          <Parallax speed={-10} className="absolute inset-x-0 top-24">
            <div className="mx-auto w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-blue-500/30" />
          </Parallax>

          <Parallax speed={0} className="absolute inset-x-0 top-48">
            <p className="text-center text-white text-2xl font-bold">
              Scroll Parallax
            </p>
          </Parallax>

          <Parallax speed={10} className="absolute inset-x-0 top-72">
            <div className="mx-auto w-24 h-24 rounded-lg bg-emerald-500/40" />
          </Parallax>

          <Parallax speed={20} className="absolute inset-x-0 top-96">
            <div className="mx-auto w-16 h-16 rounded-md bg-amber-500/50" />
          </Parallax>
        </div>
      </div>
    </ParallaxProvider>
  );
}
```

## Text Typewriter

- **Slug**: typewriter
- **Category**: text
- **Description**: Typewriter animation that cycles through phrases with a blinking cursor. Powered by react-type-animation.
- **Library**: react-type-animation (react-type-animation)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/maxeth/react-type-animation
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 3.5 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 800
- **Weekly downloads**: 150000
- **Last updated**: 2024-03
- **Tags**: text, typewriter, typing, animation, terminal
- **Keywords**: typewriter effect, typing animation, text typewriter, type animation, blinking cursor, auto typing, text cycle, phrase rotation, terminal typing, hero text typing, animated heading, text loop, sequential text, typewriter cursor, character by character, typing out text, words appearing, cursor blinking, letter by letter, progressive text reveal, text streaming, typing simulator, hero section typing, landing page tagline, rotating headlines, subtitle animation, chatbot typing, CLI simulation, loading text typing, splash screen text, 타이프라이터, 타이핑 효과, 텍스트 애니메이션, 자동 타이핑, 커서 깜빡임, 텍스트 루프, 타자기 효과, 히어로 타이핑, 문구 회전, 타이핑 시뮬레이션, 순차 텍스트, 글자 애니메이션, react-type-animation, type animation component, npm typewriter

### Install
```bash
npm install react-type-animation
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { TypeAnimation } from "react-type-animation";

export default function Typewriter() {
  return (
    <TypeAnimation
      sequence={[
        "Hello World",
        2000,
        "Welcome to my site",
        2000,
        "Let's build something great",
        2000,
      ]}
      wrapper="h1"
      speed={50}
      repeat={Infinity}
      cursor={true}
      style={{
        fontSize: "2rem",
        fontWeight: 700,
        color: "#ffffff",
        fontFamily: "monospace",
      }}
    />
  );
}
```

## 3D Card Tilt

- **Slug**: parallax-tilt
- **Category**: 3d
- **Description**: Interactive 3D tilt effect with glare on hover. Powered by react-parallax-tilt.
- **Library**: react-parallax-tilt (react-parallax-tilt)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/mkosir/react-parallax-tilt
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 4.2 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1000
- **Weekly downloads**: 120000
- **Last updated**: 2025-04
- **Tags**: 3d, tilt, parallax, hover, card, interactive
- **Keywords**: 3d card, tilt effect, parallax card, hover tilt, card tilt, 3d hover, interactive card, perspective card, glare effect, tilt on hover, mouse follow, gyroscope tilt, card rotation, depth effect, 3d transform, tilt animation, floating card, card with depth, tilting element, glossy card, shine effect, reflection card, glass card hover, pricing card, team member card, portfolio card, product card, feature card hover, testimonial card, NFT card, dashboard widget, profile card 3d, hero card effect, 3D 카드, 틸트 효과, 패럴랙스, 호버 틸트, 카드 기울기, 3D 호버 효과, 인터랙티브 카드, 원근감 카드, 글레어 효과, 마우스 따라가기, 카드 회전, 부유 카드, react-parallax-tilt, tilt component, npm parallax tilt

### Install
```bash
npm install react-parallax-tilt
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import Tilt from "react-parallax-tilt";

export default function TiltCard() {
  return (
    <Tilt
      tiltMaxAngleX={15}
      tiltMaxAngleY={15}
      perspective={500}
      glareEnable={true}
      glareMaxOpacity={0.3}
      scale={1.02}
    >
      <div
        style={{
          width: 280,
          height: 180,
          borderRadius: 16,
          background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea, #764ba2)",
          display: "flex",
          alignItems: "center",
          justifyContent: "center",
          color: "#fff",
          fontSize: "1.25rem",
          fontWeight: 700,
        }}
      >
        Hover me!
      </div>
    </Tilt>
  );
}
```

## Infinite Marquee

- **Slug**: marquee
- **Category**: scroll
- **Description**: Smoothly scrolling infinite marquee with pause-on-hover and gradient edges. Powered by react-fast-marquee.
- **Library**: react-fast-marquee (react-fast-marquee)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/justin-chu/react-fast-marquee
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 2.1 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1500
- **Weekly downloads**: 200000
- **Last updated**: 2024-01
- **Tags**: marquee, scroll, infinite, loop, ticker, animation
- **Keywords**: marquee, infinite scroll, scrolling text, ticker, logo ticker, brand marquee, scrolling banner, auto scroll, continuous scroll, horizontal scroll, text carousel, logo carousel, endless scroll, scroll loop, marquee animation, news ticker, scrolling badges, moving text, sliding logos, rolling text, flowing content, seamless loop, smooth scroll ticker, client logos, tech stack banner, partner logos, sponsor ticker, testimonial scroll, social proof marquee, skill badges scroll, announcement bar, breaking news ticker, featured brands, 무한 스크롤, 마퀴, 로고 티커, 스크롤 배너, 자동 스크롤, 수평 스크롤, 로고 캐러셀, 끝없는 스크롤, 텍스트 티커, 브랜드 마퀴, 뉴스 티커, 무한 루프 스크롤, react-fast-marquee, marquee component, npm marquee

### Install
```bash
npm install react-fast-marquee
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import Marquee from "react-fast-marquee";

export default function InfiniteMarquee() {
  const items = ["React", "Next.js", "Tailwind", "TypeScript", "Prisma"];

  return (
    <Marquee pauseOnHover={true} gradient={true} gradientColor="black" speed={40}>
      {items.map((item) => (
        <span
          key={item}
          style={{
            padding: "0.5rem 1.25rem",
            margin: "0 0.5rem",
            borderRadius: 9999,
            background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea, #764ba2)",
            color: "#fff",
            fontSize: "0.875rem",
            fontWeight: 600,
          }}
        >
          {item}
        </span>
      ))}
    </Marquee>
  );
}
```

---

## Hand-drawn Annotation

- **Slug**: rough-notation
- **Category**: text
- **Description**: Animate hand-drawn style annotations on text — underlines, circles, highlights, and brackets that feel sketchy and personal.
- **Library**: react-rough-notation (react-rough-notation)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/linkstrifer/react-rough-notation
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 3.2 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 900
- **Weekly downloads**: 30000
- **Last updated**: 2022-10
- **Tags**: annotation, hand-drawn, underline, highlight, circle, sketch
- **Keywords**: rough notation, hand-drawn annotation, sketch annotation, underline effect, circle text, highlight text, bracket annotation, text annotation, hand-drawn underline, sketch highlight, animated annotation, rough underline, rough highlight, text decoration animation, annotation group, sequential annotation, hand-drawn style, sketch style text, pencil underline, marker highlight, circle emphasis, bracket decoration, organic text decoration, imperfect lines, natural annotation, hero text annotation, landing page emphasis, callout text, key point highlight, text emphasis effect, reading highlight, content annotation, educational highlight, presentation text, 손그림 주석, 밑줄 효과, 하이라이트, 동그라미 강조, 스케치 스타일, 텍스트 주석, 손으로 그린 밑줄, 애니메이션 주석, 텍스트 강조 효과, 괄호 장식, react-rough-notation, RoughNotation, RoughNotationGroup, svg annotation, canvas-free annotation

### Install
```bash
bun add react-rough-notation
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { RoughNotation, RoughNotationGroup } from "react-rough-notation";

export default function HandDrawnAnnotation() {
  const [show, setShow] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    setShow(true);
  }, []);

  return (
    <RoughNotationGroup show={show}>
      <p className="text-2xl leading-relaxed">
        <RoughNotation type="underline" color="#f59e0b" order={1}>
          Underlined text
        </RoughNotation>{" "}
        and{" "}
        <RoughNotation type="highlight" color="#3b82f6" order={2} multiline>
          highlighted text
        </RoughNotation>{" "}
        and{" "}
        <RoughNotation type="circle" color="#ef4444" padding={8} order={3}>
          circled
        </RoughNotation>{" "}
        words.
      </p>
    </RoughNotationGroup>
  );
}
```

---

## Animated Number

- **Slug**: number-flow
- **Category**: text
- **Description**: Smoothly animated number transitions that morph digits in place. Perfect for dashboards, counters, and stats that update in real time.
- **Library**: NumberFlow (@number-flow/react)
- **Library URL**: https://number-flow.barvian.me/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 8.5 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 5500
- **Weekly downloads**: 50000
- **Last updated**: 2025-03
- **Tags**: number, counter, animated, transition, digit, morphing
- **Keywords**: number flow, animated number, number transition, digit morphing, counter animation, number counter, animated counter, smooth number, rolling number, number ticker, dashboard counter, stat animation, metric animation, number morph, digit animation, counting animation, sliding digits, morphing numbers, smooth counter, animated digits, rolling counter, flip number, odometer effect, number carousel, digit transition, dashboard metric, revenue counter, price animation, score counter, live stat, real-time number, analytics counter, kpi animation, progress number, 숫자 애니메이션, 카운터, 숫자 모핑, 숫자 전환 효과, 대시보드 카운터, 숫자 트랜지션, 실시간 숫자, 애니메이션 카운터, 숫자 슬라이드, 통계 애니메이션, @number-flow/react, NumberFlow, useGrouping, tabular-nums, digit morph transition

### Install
```bash
bun add @number-flow/react
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import NumberFlow from "@number-flow/react";

export default function AnimatedNumber() {
  const [value, setValue] = useState(12345);

  useEffect(() => {
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      setValue((prev) => prev + Math.floor(Math.random() * 200 + 50));
    }, 2000);
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, []);

  return (
    <div className="text-6xl font-bold tabular-nums">
      $<NumberFlow
        value={value}
        format={{ useGrouping: true }}
        transformTiming={{ duration: 750, easing: "ease-out" }}
      />
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Animated Counter

- **Slug**: countup
- **Category**: text
- **Description**: Smooth count-up animations that bring numbers to life. Perfect for dashboards, statistics sections, and landing pages that showcase impressive metrics.
- **Library**: react-countup (react-countup)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/glennreyes/react-countup
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 4.2 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1800
- **Weekly downloads**: 450000
- **Last updated**: 2024-06
- **Tags**: counter, number, countup, animation, dashboard, statistics
- **Keywords**: count up, animated counter, number animation, dashboard metrics, statistics animation, counting number, number counter, count up animation, animated number, metric counter, stats counter, incrementing number, rising number, number reveal, counter animation, scroll counter, counting up effect, animated statistics, live counter, growing number, rolling count, dynamic counter, smooth counting, number climb, ascending number, dashboard stat, landing page metric, revenue counter, user count, download counter, visitor counter, achievement counter, milestone number, kpi counter, progress counter, sales counter, conversion counter, 카운트업, 숫자 카운터, 애니메이션 카운터, 통계 애니메이션, 대시보드 숫자, 숫자 증가 효과, 실시간 카운터, 숫자 올라가는 효과, 카운팅 애니메이션, 지표 애니메이션, react-countup, CountUp, enableScrollSpy, countup.js, scroll spy counter

### Install
```bash
bun add react-countup
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import CountUp from "react-countup";

const stats = [
  { end: 12847, label: "Users", prefix: "", suffix: "", decimals: 0 },
  { end: 99.9, label: "Uptime %", prefix: "", suffix: "%", decimals: 1 },
  { end: 2450000, label: "Revenue", prefix: "$", suffix: "", decimals: 0 },
];

export default function AnimatedCounter() {
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-6">
      {stats.map((stat) => (
        <div key={stat.label} className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-6">
          <span className="text-4xl font-bold tabular-nums">
            <CountUp
              end={stat.end}
              prefix={stat.prefix}
              suffix={stat.suffix}
              decimals={stat.decimals}
              duration={2.5}
              separator=","
              enableScrollSpy
              scrollSpyOnce
            />
          </span>
          <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">{stat.label}</span>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Confetti Rain

- **Slug**: confetti
- **Category**: particle
- **Description**: Colorful confetti particles rain down to celebrate actions and milestones. Contained within any element, not just full-screen.
- **Library**: react-confetti (react-confetti)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/alampros/react-confetti
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 4.8 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1500
- **Weekly downloads**: 300000
- **Last updated**: 2024-01
- **Tags**: confetti, celebration, party, reward, animation, fun
- **Keywords**: confetti, confetti rain, confetti animation, celebration effect, party effect, confetti explosion, confetti burst, reward animation, success confetti, achievement effect, confetti shower, falling confetti, confetti particles, celebration particles, victory animation, win animation, colorful confetti, rainbow confetti, falling paper, paper bits, confetti pieces, scattered confetti, floating confetti, raining confetti, confetti overlay, checkout success, form completion, level up, achievement unlocked, payment success, signup celebration, milestone reached, goal completion, game win screen, 콘페티, 축하 효과, 파티 이펙트, 축하 애니메이션, 색종이 효과, 폭죽 효과, 보상 애니메이션, 성공 이펙트, 승리 효과, 파티클 애니메이션, react-confetti, ReactConfetti, canvas confetti, confetti component, contained confetti

### Install
```bash
bun add react-confetti
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState, useRef, useCallback, useEffect } from "react";
import ReactConfetti from "react-confetti";

export default function ConfettiRain() {
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const [dimensions, setDimensions] = useState({ width: 0, height: 0 });
  const [isActive, setIsActive] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (containerRef.current) {
      setDimensions({
        width: containerRef.current.offsetWidth,
        height: containerRef.current.offsetHeight,
      });
    }
  }, []);

  return (
    <div
      ref={containerRef}
      className="relative w-full h-64 rounded-xl overflow-hidden"
    >
      {isActive && dimensions.width > 0 && (
        <ReactConfetti
          width={dimensions.width}
          height={dimensions.height}
          recycle={false}
          numberOfPieces={200}
        />
      )}
      <button onClick={() => setIsActive(true)}>
        Celebrate!
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Awesome Reveal

- **Slug**: react-awesome-reveal
- **Category**: scroll
- **Description**: React components to add reveal animations using the Intersection Observer API and CSS Animations.
- **Library**: react-awesome-reveal (react-awesome-reveal)
- **Library URL**: https://react-awesome-reveal.morello.dev
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 5.6 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1193
- **Weekly downloads**: 41979
- **Last updated**: 2024-12
- **Tags**: react, reveal, react-reveal, scroll, typescript, intersection, intersection-observer
- **Keywords**: reveal animation, fade in, slide in, zoom in, bounce in, scroll reveal, entrance animation, staggered animation, cascade effect, reveal on scroll, appear animation, smooth reveal, element reveal, content reveal, landing page animation, section reveal, scroll triggered, intersection observer animation, lazy animation, on-scroll effect, page load animation, viewport animation, scroll interaction, progressive reveal, sequential animation, delayed entrance, 스크롤 애니메이션, 등장 효과, 페이드인 효과, 슬라이드 애니메이션, 줌 애니메이션, 바운스 효과, 스크롤 트리거, 화면 진입 효과, react-awesome-reveal, intersection-observer, css-animations, react, typescript, triggerOnce, cascade, damping

### Install
```bash
bun add react-awesome-reveal
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { Fade, Slide, Zoom, Bounce } from "react-awesome-reveal";

export default function RevealExample() {
  return (
    <div className="space-y-8 p-8">
      <Fade triggerOnce>
        <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold">Fade In</h1>
      </Fade>

      <Slide direction="left" triggerOnce>
        <p className="text-lg">This slides in from the left.</p>
      </Slide>

      <Zoom delay={200} triggerOnce>
        <div className="p-6 bg-blue-500 rounded-xl text-white">
          Zoomed in with delay
        </div>
      </Zoom>

      <Bounce cascade damping={0.1}>
        <p>B</p>
        <p>O</p>
        <p>U</p>
        <p>N</p>
        <p>C</p>
        <p>E</p>
      </Bounce>
    </div>
  );
}
```

- **Description**: Drawer component for React.

- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 17.9 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 8271
- **Weekly downloads**: 23227851
- **Last updated**: 2025-10
- **Tags**: react, drawer, dialog, modal
- **Keywords**: drawer, bottom sheet, slide up panel, pull up drawer, swipe drawer, spring animation drawer, smooth drawer, drag to dismiss, sheet component, overlay panel, mobile drawer, gesture drawer, snap point drawer, mobile menu, action sheet, bottom navigation, settings panel, filter drawer, cart drawer, navigation drawer, content panel, modal alternative, mobile dialog, touch drawer, responsive drawer, 드로어, 바텀시트, 모바일 메뉴, 슬라이드 패널, 스와이프 드로어, 터치 드로어, 모달 대안, vaul, radix-dialog, react-drawer, framer-motion, snap-points, spring-physics, gesture-based

### Install
```bash
bun add vaul
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { Drawer } from "vaul";

export default function DrawerExample() {
  return (
    <Drawer.Root>
      <Drawer.Trigger asChild>
        <button className="px-4 py-2 bg-white rounded-lg text-black">
          Open Drawer
        </button>
      </Drawer.Trigger>
      <Drawer.Portal>
        <Drawer.Overlay className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/40" />
        <Drawer.Content className="fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 rounded-t-2xl bg-white p-6">
          <div className="mx-auto mb-4 h-1.5 w-12 rounded-full bg-gray-300" />
          <Drawer.Title className="text-lg font-semibold mb-2">
            Settings
          </Drawer.Title>
          <Drawer.Description className="text-gray-500">
            Drag down to dismiss this drawer.
          </Drawer.Description>
        </Drawer.Content>
      </Drawer.Portal>
    </Drawer.Root>
  );
}
```

## Sonner

- **Slug**: sonner
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: An opinionated toast component for React.
- **Library**: sonner (sonner)
- **Library URL**: https://sonner.emilkowal.ski/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 9.1 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 12200
- **Weekly downloads**: 32367752
- **Last updated**: 2025-12
- **Tags**: react, notifications, toast, snackbar, message
- **Keywords**: toast notification, toast popup, notification bar, snackbar alert, floating message, stacked toasts, animated toast, slide-in notification, dismissable toast, success toast, error toast, info toast, promise toast, loading toast, toast queue, form feedback, action confirmation, error message, status notification, upload progress, save confirmation, real-time alert, user feedback, system notification, api response toast, clipboard toast, undo toast, 토스트 알림, 알림 메시지, 스낵바, 팝업 알림, 상태 메시지, 피드백 알림, 성공 알림, 에러 알림, sonner, react-toast, toast-component, toaster-provider, hot-toast, notification-system

### Install
```bash
bun add sonner
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { Toaster, toast } from "sonner";

export default function ToastExample() {
  return (
    <div>
      <Toaster position="top-right" />

      <button onClick={() => toast.success("Saved successfully!")}>
        Success
      </button>

      <button onClick={() => toast.error("Something went wrong")}>
        Error
      </button>

      <button onClick={() => toast.info("Tip: you can drag to dismiss")}>
        Info
      </button>

      <button
        onClick={() =>
          toast.promise(fetch("/api/data"), {
            loading: "Fetching data...",
            success: "Data loaded!",
            error: "Failed to load",
          })
        }
      >
        Promise
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Rewards

- **Slug**: react-rewards
- **Category**: particle
- **Description**: This package lets you easily add micro-interactions to your app and reward users with the rain of confetti, emoji or balloons.
- **Library**: react-rewards (react-rewards)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/thedevelobear/react-rewards
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 3.6 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1681
- **Weekly downloads**: 64355
- **Last updated**: 2025-01
- **Tags**: react, react-rewards, confetti, emoji, balloons, cannon, microinteractions
- **Keywords**: confetti burst, emoji rain, balloon animation, reward animation, celebration effect, micro-interaction, particle burst, confetti shower, floating emoji, colorful balloons, festive animation, joy animation, sprinkle effect, pop animation, firework effect, checkout celebration, form submission reward, achievement badge, gamification effect, like button reward, signup celebration, purchase confirmation, level up animation, streak reward, goal completion, button feedback, positive reinforcement, 콘페티 효과, 이모지 애니메이션, 풍선 효과, 보상 애니메이션, 축하 이펙트, 마이크로 인터랙션, 게이미피케이션, 파티클 효과, react-rewards, useReward, confetti-hook, micro-interactions, reward-system, canvas-animation

### Install
```bash
bun add react-rewards
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useReward } from "react-rewards";

export default function RewardsExample() {
  const { reward: confettiReward, isAnimating: isConfetti } = useReward(
    "confettiBtn",
    "confetti"
  );
  const { reward: emojiReward, isAnimating: isEmoji } = useReward(
    "emojiBtn",
    "emoji",
    { emoji: ["🎉", "🔥", "⭐"] }
  );
  const { reward: balloonsReward, isAnimating: isBalloons } = useReward(
    "balloonsBtn",
    "balloons"
  );

  return (
    <div className="flex gap-4 p-8">
      <button id="confettiBtn" onClick={confettiReward} disabled={isConfetti}>
        Confetti 🎊
      </button>
      <button id="emojiBtn" onClick={emojiReward} disabled={isEmoji}>
        Emoji 🎉
      </button>
      <button id="balloonsBtn" onClick={balloonsReward} disabled={isBalloons}>
        Balloons 🎈
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Embla Carousel React

- **Slug**: embla-carousel-react
- **Category**: scroll
- **Description**: A lightweight carousel library with fluid motion and great swipe precision
- **Library**: embla-carousel-react (embla-carousel-react)
- **Library URL**: https://www.embla-carousel.com
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 7.1 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 8151
- **Weekly downloads**: 22275385
- **Last updated**: 2026-04
- **Tags**: slider, carousel, slideshow, gallery, lightweight, touch, javascript
- **Keywords**: carousel, slider, slideshow, image gallery, card carousel, content slider, smooth scroll carousel, drag carousel, snap carousel, infinite loop carousel, horizontal scroll, fluid motion slider, swipeable gallery, responsive carousel, auto-play slider, product gallery, hero carousel, testimonial slider, image viewer, portfolio gallery, feature showcase, banner slider, thumbnail carousel, onboarding slides, mobile swipe gallery, photo gallery, media carousel, 캐러셀, 슬라이더, 이미지 갤러리, 스와이프 슬라이더, 드래그 캐러셀, 무한 루프 슬라이더, 가로 스크롤, 터치 슬라이더, embla-carousel, useEmblaCarousel, embla-carousel-react, snap-scroll, touch-gesture, lightweight-carousel

### Install
```bash
bun add embla-carousel-react
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useCallback } from "react";
import useEmblaCarousel from "embla-carousel-react";

const slides = ["Slide 1", "Slide 2", "Slide 3", "Slide 4", "Slide 5"];

export default function CarouselExample() {
  const [emblaRef, emblaApi] = useEmblaCarousel({ loop: true });

  const scrollPrev = useCallback(() => emblaApi?.scrollPrev(), [emblaApi]);
  const scrollNext = useCallback(() => emblaApi?.scrollNext(), [emblaApi]);

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="overflow-hidden" ref={emblaRef}>
        <div className="flex">
          {slides.map((label) => (
            <div
              key={label}
              className="flex-[0_0_100%] min-w-0 flex items-center justify-center h-48 bg-gray-100 rounded-xl"
            >
              {label}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className="flex gap-2 mt-4">
        <button onClick={scrollPrev}>Prev</button>
        <button onClick={scrollNext}>Next</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Loading Skeleton

- **Slug**: react-loading-skeleton
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Make beautiful, animated loading skeletons that automatically adapt to your app.
- **Library**: react-loading-skeleton (react-loading-skeleton)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/dvtng/react-loading-skeleton#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 0.9 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 4187
- **Weekly downloads**: 1047335
- **Last updated**: 2026-03
- **Tags**: react, loading, skeleton, placeholder, shimmer
- **Keywords**: skeleton, loading skeleton, shimmer effect, placeholder animation, pulse animation, skeleton loader, skeleton screen, content placeholder, skeleton shimmer, animated placeholder, glowing skeleton, loading placeholder, skeleton pulse, data loading, lazy loading, progressive loading, content loading state, loading indicator, loading UI, skeleton card, skeleton avatar, skeleton text, skeleton button, form skeleton, list skeleton, feed loading, dashboard loading, 스켈레톤, 로딩 스켈레톤, 스켈레톤 UI, 로딩 애니메이션, 플레이스홀더, 로딩 화면, 스켈레톤 로더, react-loading-skeleton, SkeletonTheme, baseColor, highlightColor, skeleton component

### Install
```bash
bun add react-loading-skeleton
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import Skeleton, { SkeletonTheme } from "react-loading-skeleton";
import "react-loading-skeleton/dist/skeleton.css";

export default function LoadingCard() {
  return (
    <SkeletonTheme baseColor="#1a1a2e" highlightColor="#2a2a4a">
      <div className="max-w-sm rounded-xl bg-gray-900 p-5">
        {/* Avatar + Name */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-4">
          <Skeleton circle width={48} height={48} />
          <div className="flex-1">
            <Skeleton width="60%" height={16} />
            <Skeleton width="40%" height={12} style={{ marginTop: 6 }} />
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Text lines */}
        <Skeleton count={3} height={12} style={{ marginBottom: 6 }} />

        {/* Action buttons */}
        <div className="flex gap-3 mt-4">
          <Skeleton width={80} height={32} borderRadius={8} />
          <Skeleton width={80} height={32} borderRadius={8} />
        </div>
      </div>
    </SkeletonTheme>
  );
}
```

---

## Spinners

- **Slug**: react-spinners
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: A collection of beautiful react loading spinners with smooth animations.
- **Library**: react-spinners (react-spinners)
- **Library URL**: https://www.davidhu.io/react-spinners/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 6.3 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 3339
- **Weekly downloads**: 609517
- **Last updated**: 2026-03
- **Tags**: react-spinners, react-spinner, react, loader, loading, spinner
- **Keywords**: spinner, loading spinner, pulse loader, beat loader, clip loader, ring loader, bar loader, moon loader, circle spinner, dot spinner, rotating spinner, animated spinner, spinning animation, loading ring, loading dots, loading bar, loading indicator, loading state, async loading, data fetching, button loading, page loading, submit loading, form processing, content loading, lazy load spinner, 스피너, 로딩 스피너, 로딩 인디케이터, 로딩 애니메이션, 로더, 로딩 상태, 비동기 로딩, react-spinners, PulseLoader, BeatLoader, ClipLoader, RingLoader, BarLoader, MoonLoader

### Install
```bash
bun add react-spinners
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { PulseLoader, BeatLoader, ClipLoader, RingLoader, BarLoader, MoonLoader } from "react-spinners";

export default function SpinnersShowcase() {
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-6 p-8">
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <PulseLoader color="#8b5cf6" size={12} />
        <span className="text-sm text-gray-400">PulseLoader</span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <BeatLoader color="#8b5cf6" size={12} />
        <span className="text-sm text-gray-400">BeatLoader</span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <ClipLoader color="#8b5cf6" size={40} />
        <span className="text-sm text-gray-400">ClipLoader</span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <RingLoader color="#8b5cf6" size={50} />
        <span className="text-sm text-gray-400">RingLoader</span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <BarLoader color="#8b5cf6" width={120} />
        <span className="text-sm text-gray-400">BarLoader</span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <MoonLoader color="#8b5cf6" size={40} />
        <span className="text-sm text-gray-400">MoonLoader</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Command Palette

- **Slug**: cmdk
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Fast, composable, unstyled command menu for React with built-in search and keyboard navigation.
- **Library**: cmdk (cmdk)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/pacocoursey/cmdk#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 14.6 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 12444
- **Weekly downloads**: 25046222
- **Last updated**: 2025-10
- **Tags**: cmdk, command-palette, search, keyboard, menu
- **Keywords**: command palette, command menu, command bar, command k, cmd+k, spotlight search, quick actions, action menu, search dialog, search modal, fuzzy search, command dialog, command input, omnibar, keyboard navigation, keyboard shortcut, quick search, app launcher, file search, action search, command center, navigation menu, power user menu, shortcut menu, search overlay, global search, 커맨드 팔레트, 명령 메뉴, 검색 모달, 빠른 검색, 커맨드 바, 검색 팔레트, 키보드 단축키, cmdk, Command component, Command.Input, Command.List, Command.Item, command menu react

### Install
```bash
bun add cmdk
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { Command } from "cmdk";
import { useState } from "react";

export default function CommandPalette() {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);

  return (
    <>
      <button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>
        Open Command Palette (Cmd+K)
      </button>

      <Command.Dialog
        open={open}
        onOpenChange={setOpen}
        label="Command Menu"
        className="fixed inset-0 z-50"
      >
        <Command.Input
          placeholder="Type a command or search..."
          className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-gray-900 text-white outline-none border-b border-gray-700"
        />
        <Command.List className="max-h-80 overflow-y-auto p-2 bg-gray-900">
          <Command.Empty>No results found.</Command.Empty>

          <Command.Group heading="Actions">
            <Command.Item onSelect={() => console.log("New file")}>
              Create New File
            </Command.Item>
            <Command.Item onSelect={() => console.log("Settings")}>
              Open Settings
            </Command.Item>
          </Command.Group>

          <Command.Group heading="Navigation">
            <Command.Item onSelect={() => console.log("Home")}>
              Go to Home
            </Command.Item>
            <Command.Item onSelect={() => console.log("Dashboard")}>
              Go to Dashboard
            </Command.Item>
          </Command.Group>
        </Command.List>
      </Command.Dialog>
    </>
  );
}
```

---

## Drei 3D Effects

- **Slug**: react-three-drei
- **Category**: 3d
- **Description**: Useful helpers and abstractions for react-three-fiber: Stars, Float, MeshDistortMaterial, and more.
- **Library**: @react-three/drei (@react-three/drei)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/pmndrs/drei
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 484.6 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 9557
- **Weekly downloads**: 3429545
- **Last updated**: 2026-03
- **Tags**: react, three, threejs, react-three-fiber, 3d, webgl
- **Keywords**: 3d scene, three.js, 3d sphere, floating sphere, distorted mesh, starfield, star background, 3d orb, webgl scene, 3d animation, glowing sphere, metallic sphere, 3d particles, space background, 3d hero section, 3d landing page, 3d background, interactive 3d, webgl effects, 3d visualization, immersive background, product showcase 3d, 3d web experience, creative coding, 3D 효과, 쓰리디 씬, 별 배경, 플로팅 구체, 웹지엘, 3D 랜딩페이지, 3D 인터랙션, react-three-fiber, @react-three/drei, Canvas, Stars, Float, MeshDistortMaterial, drei helpers

### Install
```bash
bun add @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei three
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { Canvas } from "@react-three/fiber";
import { Stars, Float, MeshDistortMaterial } from "@react-three/drei";

function FloatingOrb() {
  return (
    <Float speed={2} rotationIntensity={1.5} floatIntensity={2}>
      <mesh scale={1.8}>
        <icosahedronGeometry args={[1, 16]} />
        <MeshDistortMaterial
          color="#8b5cf6"
          emissive="#4c1d95"
          emissiveIntensity={0.5}
          roughness={0.2}
          metalness={0.8}
          distort={0.4}
          speed={3}
        />
      </mesh>
    </Float>
  );
}

// IMPORTANT: Use next/dynamic with { ssr: false } to wrap this component
// in Next.js to prevent SSR errors with Three.js
export default function DreiScene() {
  return (
    <Canvas
      camera={{ position: [0, 0, 5], fov: 60 }}
      style={{ width: "100%", height: "400px", background: "#050510" }}
    >
      <ambientLight intensity={0.3} />
      <pointLight position={[10, 10, 10]} intensity={1} color="#8b5cf6" />
      <Stars radius={80} depth={60} count={2000} factor={5} fade speed={1.5} />
      <FloatingOrb />
    </Canvas>
  );
}
```

---

## Lottie Animations

- **Slug**: lottie-react
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Render After Effects animations natively in React using the Lottie format for lightweight, scalable vector animations.
- **Library**: lottie-react (lottie-react)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/Gamote/lottie-react
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 58.3 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1100
- **Weekly downloads**: 450000
- **Last updated**: 2025-06
- **Tags**: lottie, animation, after-effects, motion, vector
- **Keywords**: lottie animation, lottie player, vector animation, json animation, motion graphics, after effects animation, bodymovin, animated icon, animated illustration, micro animation, lottie web, scalable animation, lightweight animation, smooth animation, loading animation, onboarding animation, success animation, error animation, empty state animation, splash screen, animated logo, hero animation, celebration animation, transition animation, interactive animation, ui animation, 로티 애니메이션, 벡터 애니메이션, 모션 그래픽, 로티 플레이어, 애프터이펙트 애니메이션, UI 애니메이션, 제이슨 애니메이션, lottie-react, animationData, Lottie component, lottie-web, bodymovin json

### Install
```bash
bun add lottie-react
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import Lottie from "lottie-react";
// Import your animation JSON (exported from After Effects via Bodymovin)
import animationData from "./my-animation.json";

export default function LottieExample() {
  return (
    <div className="w-64 h-64">
      <Lottie
        animationData={animationData}
        loop={true}
        autoplay={true}
        style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

// You can also control playback:
//
// import { useRef } from "react";
// import Lottie, { LottieRefCurrentProps } from "lottie-react";
//
// function ControlledLottie() {
//   const lottieRef = useRef<LottieRefCurrentProps>(null);
//
//   return (
//     <>
//       <Lottie lottieRef={lottieRef} animationData={animationData} />
//       <button onClick={() => lottieRef.current?.pause()}>Pause</button>
//       <button onClick={() => lottieRef.current?.play()}>Play</button>
//     </>
//   );
// }
```

## Haiku

- **Slug**: react-haiku
- **Category**: hover
- **Description**: React Hook & Utility Library — custom cursor follower with glowing trail that tracks mouse position with smooth delay.
- **Library**: react-haiku (react-haiku)
- **Library URL**: https://reacthaiku.dev/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 7.2 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 985
- **Weekly downloads**: 2409
- **Last updated**: 2025-08
- **Tags**: reactjs, react, utility, components, javascript, hooks, cursor, mouse
- **Keywords**: cursor follower, glowing cursor, custom cursor, mouse trail, cursor glow, neon cursor, floating cursor, trailing effect, cursor animation, cursor tracker, hover glow, mouse glow, radial glow cursor, soft cursor trail, smooth cursor, interactive landing page, portfolio hover effect, creative cursor, custom mouse pointer, cursor replacement, mouse position tracking, hover interaction, mouse coordinate display, cursor effect component, mouse follower widget, UI hover feedback, cursor spotlight, 커서 팔로워, 마우스 추적, 커서 효과, 글로우 커서, 마우스 포지션, 커서 애니메이션, 호버 이펙트, 마우스 트레일, 커스텀 커서, react-haiku, useMousePosition, requestAnimationFrame, lerp cursor, mouse event handler, pointer tracking

### Install
```bash
bun add react-haiku
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useMousePosition } from "react-haiku";
import { useState } from "react";

export default function CursorFollower() {
  const { x, y } = useMousePosition();
  const [follower, setFollower] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0 });

  // Smooth follow with CSS transition
  return (
    <div className="relative w-full h-screen bg-black cursor-none">
      {/* Glow cursor */}
      <div
        className="pointer-events-none fixed"
        style={{
          left: (x ?? 0) - 30,
          top: (y ?? 0) - 30,
          width: 60,
          height: 60,
          borderRadius: "50%",
          background:
            "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(139,92,246,0.8) 0%, transparent 70%)",
          boxShadow: "0 0 40px 10px rgba(139,92,246,0.3)",
          transition: "left 0.1s ease-out, top 0.1s ease-out",
        }}
      />

      {/* Coordinate display */}
      <div className="fixed bottom-4 left-4 text-white/50 text-xs font-mono">
        x: {x ?? 0} y: {y ?? 0}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Transition State

- **Slug**: react-transition-state
- **Category**: transition
- **Description**: Zero dependency React transition state machine. Toggle elements with enter/exit animations using a simple hook-based API.
- **Library**: react-transition-state (react-transition-state)
- **Library URL**: https://szhsin.github.io/react-transition-state/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 1.1 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 487
- **Weekly downloads**: 479313
- **Last updated**: 2026-04
- **Tags**: react, transition, animation, component, hook, state machine
- **Keywords**: fade in, fade out, slide transition, enter animation, exit animation, mount animation, unmount animation, opacity transition, smooth appear, smooth disappear, card reveal, element toggle, visibility transition, modal transition, dropdown animation, tooltip enter exit, accordion animation, tab switch transition, menu open close, notification appear, dialog animation, popover transition, conditional render animation, mount unmount hook, show hide animation, toggle visibility, 트랜지션, 페이드 인, 페이드 아웃, 진입 애니메이션, 퇴장 애니메이션, 전환 효과, 마운트 애니메이션, 토글 애니메이션, 상태 머신, react-transition-state, useTransitionState, preEnter, mountOnEnter, unmountOnExit, transition hook, zero dependency transition

### Install
```bash
bun add react-transition-state
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useTransitionState } from "react-transition-state";

export default function TransitionExample() {
  const [state, toggle] = useTransitionState({
    timeout: 500,
    preEnter: true,
    mountOnEnter: true,
    unmountOnExit: true,
  });

  return (
    <div className="p-8">
      <button
        onClick={toggle}
        className="px-4 py-2 rounded bg-violet-600 text-white mb-4"
      >
        {state.status === "entered" ? "Hide" : "Show"}
      </button>

      {state.isMounted && (
        <div
          style={{
            opacity:
              state.status === "preEnter" || state.status === "exiting"
                ? 0
                : 1,
            transform:
              state.status === "preEnter" || state.status === "exiting"
                ? "translateY(20px)"
                : "translateY(0)",
            transition: "all 500ms ease",
          }}
        >
          <div className="p-6 rounded-xl bg-white/10 border border-white/20">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold">Hello!</h3>
            <p className="text-sm opacity-60">
              I fade and slide in/out smoothly.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Scroll Motion

- **Slug**: react-scroll-motion
- **Category**: scroll
- **Description**: Easy scroll-driven animations with React. Elements fade, slide, zoom, and stick as you scroll through pages.
- **Library**: react-scroll-motion (react-scroll-motion)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/1000ship/react-scroll-motion
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 3.2 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 447
- **Weekly downloads**: 2888
- **Last updated**: 2025-01
- **Tags**: scroll, animation, react, animator, motion
- **Keywords**: scroll animation, scroll fade, scroll zoom, scroll slide, parallax scroll, sticky scroll, scroll reveal, scroll transition, page scroll effect, scroll driven animation, scroll triggered, scroll snap animation, element appear on scroll, scroll page, landing page scroll, storytelling scroll, onboarding scroll, product showcase scroll, scroll presentation, fullpage scroll, scroll section animation, hero scroll effect, portfolio scroll, marketing page animation, scroll timeline, 스크롤 애니메이션, 스크롤 모션, 스크롤 효과, 페이지 스크롤, 스크롤 전환, 스크롤 페이드, 스크롤 줌, 스크롤 트리거, 스크롤 기반 애니메이션, react-scroll-motion, ScrollContainer, ScrollPage, Animator, batch, Fade, Sticky, MoveOut, scroll animation library

### Install
```bash
bun add react-scroll-motion
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import {
  ScrollContainer,
  ScrollPage,
  Animator,
  batch,
  Fade,
  Sticky,
  MoveOut,
  FadeIn,
  ZoomIn,
} from "react-scroll-motion";

export default function ScrollMotionExample() {
  return (
    <ScrollContainer>
      {/* Page 1: Sticky text that fades out and moves up */}
      <ScrollPage>
        <Animator animation={batch(Fade(), Sticky(), MoveOut(0, -200))}>
          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold">Welcome</h1>
        </Animator>
      </ScrollPage>

      {/* Page 2: Fade and zoom in */}
      <ScrollPage>
        <Animator animation={batch(FadeIn(), ZoomIn())}>
          <div className="text-center">
            <h2 className="text-3xl font-semibold">Scroll Magic</h2>
            <p className="mt-2 opacity-60">Elements animate as you scroll</p>
          </div>
        </Animator>
      </ScrollPage>

      {/* Page 3: Simple fade with sticky */}
      <ScrollPage>
        <Animator animation={batch(Fade(), Sticky())}>
          <h2 className="text-4xl font-bold">The End</h2>
        </Animator>
      </ScrollPage>
    </ScrollContainer>
  );
}
```

---

## Lenis

- **Slug**: lenis
- **Category**: scroll
- **Description**: How smooth scroll should be. Adds inertia-based smooth scrolling with natural momentum and buttery 60fps performance.
- **Library**: lenis (lenis)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/darkroomengineering/lenis
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 5.0 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 13518
- **Weekly downloads**: 437295
- **Last updated**: 2026-04
- **Tags**: scroll, smooth, lenis, react, inertia
- **Keywords**: smooth scroll, smooth scrolling, inertia scroll, momentum scroll, butter scroll, silky scroll, natural scroll, elastic scroll, fluid scroll, soft scroll, deceleration scroll, easing scroll, scroll physics, scroll interpolation, landing page smooth scroll, portfolio smooth scroll, parallax smooth scroll, scroll experience, scroll UX, page scroll enhancement, scroll library, scroll wrapper, smooth anchor scroll, infinite scroll smooth, scroll performance, locomotive scroll alternative, 스무스 스크롤, 부드러운 스크롤, 관성 스크롤, 스크롤 라이브러리, 자연스러운 스크롤, 스크롤 물리, 레니스, 스크롤 UX, 스크롤 성능, lenis, ReactLenis, lenis/react, smoothWheel, wheelMultiplier, scroll duration, lerp scroll

### Install
```bash
bun add lenis
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { ReactLenis } from "lenis/react";

export default function SmoothScrollPage() {
  return (
    <ReactLenis root options={{ duration: 1.2, smoothWheel: true }}>
      <main>
        <section className="h-screen flex items-center justify-center">
          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold">Welcome</h1>
        </section>

        <section className="h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-900">
          <h2 className="text-3xl">Smooth Scrolling</h2>
        </section>

        <section className="h-screen flex items-center justify-center">
          <h2 className="text-3xl">With Inertia</h2>
        </section>

        <section className="h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-900">
          <p className="text-xl opacity-60">Powered by Lenis</p>
        </section>
      </main>
    </ReactLenis>
  );
}
```

## Recharts

- **Slug**: recharts
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: React charting library built on D3. Animated AreaChart and BarChart with dark theme and randomize data animation.
- **Library**: recharts (recharts)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/recharts/recharts
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 136.0 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 26944
- **Weekly downloads**: 35253644
- **Last updated**: 2026-04
- **Tags**: react, reactjs, chart, react-component, d3, data visualization
- **Keywords**: area chart, bar chart, line chart, animated chart, data visualization, chart animation, gradient chart, dark theme chart, responsive chart, interactive chart, smooth chart animation, chart transition, real-time chart, dashboard chart, analytics chart, analytics dashboard, data dashboard, revenue chart, user growth chart, metrics visualization, KPI dashboard, sales chart, performance chart, statistics display, financial chart, report visualization, monitoring dashboard, 차트, 리차트, 데이터 시각화, 영역 차트, 막대 차트, 대시보드, 차트 애니메이션, 분석 차트, 그래프, 통계 차트, recharts, AreaChart, BarChart, ResponsiveContainer, XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip, CartesianGrid, react chart library, d3 react

### Install
```bash
bun add recharts
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import {
  AreaChart,
  Area,
  BarChart,
  Bar,
  XAxis,
  YAxis,
  CartesianGrid,
  Tooltip,
  ResponsiveContainer,
} from "recharts";

const data = [
  { name: "Jan", revenue: 4000, users: 2400 },
  { name: "Feb", revenue: 3000, users: 1398 },
  { name: "Mar", revenue: 2000, users: 9800 },
  { name: "Apr", revenue: 2780, users: 3908 },
  { name: "May", revenue: 1890, users: 4800 },
  { name: "Jun", revenue: 2390, users: 3800 },
];

export default function ChartExample() {
  return (
    <div className="w-full space-y-8 p-4">
      {/* Area Chart */}
      <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
        <AreaChart data={data}>
          <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" />
          <XAxis dataKey="name" />
          <YAxis />
          <Tooltip />
          <Area
            type="monotone"
            dataKey="revenue"
            stroke="#8b5cf6"
            fill="#8b5cf6"
            fillOpacity={0.3}
            animationDuration={1200}
          />
        </AreaChart>
      </ResponsiveContainer>

      {/* Bar Chart */}
      <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={200}>
        <BarChart data={data}>
          <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" />
          <XAxis dataKey="name" />
          <YAxis />
          <Tooltip />
          <Bar
            dataKey="users"
            fill="#06b6d4"
            radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]}
            animationDuration={1000}
          />
        </BarChart>
      </ResponsiveContainer>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Compare Slider

- **Slug**: react-compare-slider
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: A slider component to compare any two React components in landscape or portrait orientation. It supports custom images, videos... and everything else.
- **Library**: react-compare-slider (react-compare-slider)
- **Library URL**: https://react-compare-slider.js.org
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 3.3 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 369
- **Weekly downloads**: 78217
- **Last updated**: 2026-03
- **Tags**: react, slider, comparison, compare, image, video, canvas
- **Keywords**: before after slider, comparison slider, image comparison, split view, side by side, draggable divider, sliding overlay, before after overlay, visual diff, two-up comparison, horizontal slider, vertical slider, photo editing comparison, design before after, image filter comparison, product comparison, retouching showcase, portfolio comparison, responsive preview, dark mode comparison, theme comparison, video comparison, canvas comparison, 비교 슬라이더, 이미지 비교, 전후 비교, 드래그 슬라이더, 비포 애프터, 슬라이딩 오버레이, 시각적 비교, 사진 비교 컴포넌트, react-compare-slider, twentytwenty, image-diff, compare-component, slider-component, react-comparison

### Install
```bash
bun add react-compare-slider
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import {
  ReactCompareSlider,
  ReactCompareSliderImage,
} from "react-compare-slider";

export default function CompareSliderExample() {
  return (
    <div style={{ maxWidth: 600, margin: "0 auto" }}>
      <ReactCompareSlider
        itemOne={
          <ReactCompareSliderImage
            src="/before.jpg"
            alt="Before"
          />
        }
        itemTwo={
          <ReactCompareSliderImage
            src="/after.jpg"
            alt="After"
          />
        }
        style={{ width: "100%", height: 400 }}
      />
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Notistack

- **Slug**: notistack
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Highly customizable notification snackbars (toasts) that can be stacked on top of each other
- **Library**: notistack (notistack)
- **Library URL**: https://www.notistack.com
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 8.2 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 4077
- **Weekly downloads**: 1452302
- **Last updated**: 2026-03
- **Tags**: notistack, enqueueSnackbar, snackbarprovider, useSnackbar, multiple, react, javascript
- **Keywords**: stacked notifications, snackbar alert, toast notification, floating message, notification queue, dismissable snackbar, success notification, error notification, warning notification, info notification, notification bar, popup alert, form validation feedback, api error message, upload status, action confirmation, real-time notification, user feedback, system alert, batch notification, notification stacking, multiple toasts, notification management, undo notification, 스낵바 알림, 스택 알림, 토스트 메시지, 알림 큐, 푸시 알림 UI, 피드백 메시지, 에러 알림, 성공 메시지, 경고 알림, notistack, enqueueSnackbar, snackbar-provider, material-ui-snackbar, react-notification, toast-queue

### Install
```bash
bun add notistack
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { SnackbarProvider, enqueueSnackbar } from "notistack";

function App() {
  return (
    <SnackbarProvider maxSnack={5} anchorOrigin={{ vertical: "top", horizontal: "right" }}>
      <NotificationButtons />
    </SnackbarProvider>
  );
}

function NotificationButtons() {
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 12, padding: 24 }}>
      <button onClick={() => enqueueSnackbar("Success!", { variant: "success" })}>
        Success
      </button>
      <button onClick={() => enqueueSnackbar("Error!", { variant: "error" })}>
        Error
      </button>
      <button onClick={() => enqueueSnackbar("Warning!", { variant: "warning" })}>
        Warning
      </button>
      <button onClick={() => enqueueSnackbar("Info!", { variant: "info" })}>
        Info
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}

export default App;
```

---

## Medium Image Zoom

- **Slug**: react-medium-image-zoom
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Accessible medium.com-style image zoom for React
- **Library**: react-medium-image-zoom (react-medium-image-zoom)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/rpearce/react-medium-image-zoom
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: unknown
- **GitHub stars**: 2109
- **Weekly downloads**: 696734
- **Last updated**: 2026-04
- **Tags**: react, medium, image, zoom, image-zoom, modal, react-component
- **Keywords**: image zoom, medium zoom, click to zoom, zoom overlay, lightbox zoom, smooth zoom, image expand, fullscreen image, zoom animation, image magnify, photo zoom, zoom-in effect, product image zoom, gallery zoom, blog image zoom, portfolio lightbox, thumbnail preview, photo detail view, image modal, accessible image zoom, responsive image zoom, content image expand, article image zoom, 이미지 줌, 미디엄 스타일 줌, 클릭 확대, 이미지 확대, 사진 줌, 라이트박스, 이미지 모달, 썸네일 확대, react-medium-image-zoom, medium-zoom, image-zoom-component, react-lightbox, zoom-component, accessible-zoom

### Install
```bash
bun add react-medium-image-zoom
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import Zoom from "react-medium-image-zoom";
// Import styles in your globals.css:
// @import "react-medium-image-zoom/dist/styles.css";

export default function ImageZoomExample() {
  return (
    <div style={{ padding: "2rem" }}>
      <Zoom>
        <img
          src="/my-image.jpg"
          alt="Zoomable"
          width={400}
          height={300}
          style={{ borderRadius: 12, cursor: "zoom-in" }}
        />
      </Zoom>
      <p style={{ color: "#888", fontSize: 12, marginTop: 8 }}>
        Click the image to zoom
      </p>
    </div>
  );
}
```

### CSS
```css
/* Add to your global CSS file */
@import "react-medium-image-zoom/dist/styles.css";
```

## Postprocessing

- **Slug**: react-three-postprocessing
- **Category**: 3d
- **Description**: postprocessing wrapper for React and @react-three/fiber
- **Library**: @react-three/postprocessing (@react-three/postprocessing)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/pmndrs/react-postprocessing
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 183.5 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1309
- **Weekly downloads**: 639896
- **Last updated**: 2025-02
- **Tags**: postprocessing, react, three, @react-three/fiber, webgl, 3d
- **Keywords**: bloom effect, glow effect, noise filter, post-processing, screen effect, visual filter, light bloom, HDR bloom, cinematic effect, film grain, vignette effect, depth of field, 3d scene effects, webgl postprocessing, game visual effects, interactive 3d, product visualization, creative coding, immersive experience, shader effects, real-time effects, scene composition, effect pipeline, 블룸 효과, 포스트프로세싱, 3D 후처리, 글로우 효과, 시각 필터, 화면 효과, 노이즈 필터, 비네트 효과, 웹GL 이펙트, react-three-postprocessing, effect-composer, pmndrs, three-fiber-effects, webgl-postprocessing, bloom-shader

### Install
```bash
bun add @react-three/postprocessing @react-three/fiber three
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { Canvas, useFrame } from "@react-three/fiber";
import { EffectComposer, Bloom, Noise } from "@react-three/postprocessing";
import { useRef } from "react";
import type { Mesh } from "three";

function GlowingSphere() {
  const ref = useRef<Mesh>(null);
  useFrame((_, delta) => {
    if (ref.current) ref.current.rotation.y += delta * 0.5;
  });

  return (
    <mesh ref={ref}>
      <icosahedronGeometry args={[1, 16]} />
      <meshStandardMaterial
        color="#8b5cf6"
        emissive="#7c3aed"
        emissiveIntensity={2}
      />
    </mesh>
  );
}

export default function PostprocessingExample() {
  return (
    <Canvas camera={{ position: [0, 0, 4] }} style={{ height: "100vh" }}>
      <ambientLight intensity={0.3} />
      <pointLight position={[10, 10, 10]} intensity={1.5} />
      <GlowingSphere />
      <EffectComposer>
        <Bloom luminanceThreshold={0.2} intensity={1.5} />
        <Noise opacity={0.05} />
      </EffectComposer>
    </Canvas>
  );
}
```

---

## Text Scramble

- **Slug**: twistezo-react-text-scramble
- **Category**: text
- **Description**: React text scramble effect
- **Library**: @twistezo/react-text-scramble (@twistezo/react-text-scramble)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/twistezo/react-text-scramble
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 1.1 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 14
- **Weekly downloads**: 46
- **Last updated**: 2026-02
- **Tags**: text, scramble, effect, react, typescript
- **Keywords**: text scramble, scramble animation, text shuffle, letter randomize, character scramble, glitch text, text decode, cipher animation, matrix text effect, hacker text, text reveal, scrambled letters, hero text animation, landing page title, rotating text, text transition, phrase switcher, text cycling, typewriter alternative, heading animation, slogan rotator, tagline animation, 텍스트 스크램블, 글자 섞기 애니메이션, 텍스트 셔플 효과, 문자 해독 효과, 텍스트 전환, 글리치 텍스트, 히어로 텍스트, 랜딩페이지 타이틀, react-text-scramble, twistezo, text-scramble-component, scramble-effect, text-animation-react


### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { TextScramble } from "@twistezo/react-text-scramble";

const phrases = ["Hello World", "Welcome", "React is awesome"];

export default function TextScrambleExample() {
  return (
    <div style={{ padding: "2rem", background: "#050510", minHeight: "100vh" }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontFamily: "monospace", fontSize: "3rem", color: "#34d399" }}>
        <TextScramble
          texts={phrases}
          letterSpeed={50}
          nextLetterSpeed={100}
          pauseTime={2000}
          characters="!@#$%^&*()_+"
        />
      </h1>
    </div>
  );
}
```
