## Floating UI

- **Slug**: floating-ui-react
- **Category**: hover
- **Description**: Floating UI for React — tooltips, popovers, dropdowns with smart positioning
- **Library**: @floating-ui/react (@floating-ui/react)
- **Library URL**: https://floating-ui.com/docs/react
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 30.1 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 32531
- **Weekly downloads**: 13365333
- **Last updated**: 2026-03
- **Tags**: tooltip, popover, dropdown, menu, popup, positioning, react
- **Keywords**: tooltip bubble, floating tooltip, hover popup, positioned overlay, arrow tooltip, dark tooltip, tooltip with arrow, contextual popup, tooltip placement, smart positioning, floating panel, button tooltip, help text popup, hover information, form field hint, icon tooltip, navigation tooltip, action description, accessibility tooltip, onboarding tooltip, user guidance popup, 툴팁, 팝업, 호버 팝업, 드롭다운 메뉴, 플로팅 UI, 위치 지정, 오버레이, 컨텍스트 메뉴, 툴팁 화살표, floating-ui, useFloating, useHover, useInteractions, flip, shift, offset, arrow, react-popper-alternative

### Install
```bash
bun add @floating-ui/react
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState, useRef } from "react";
import {
  useFloating,
  useHover,
  useInteractions,
  offset,
  flip,
  shift,
  arrow,
  FloatingArrow,
} from "@floating-ui/react";

function Tooltip({ children, content }: { children: React.ReactNode; content: string }) {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const arrowRef = useRef(null);

  const { refs, floatingStyles, context } = useFloating({
    open: isOpen,
    onOpenChange: setIsOpen,
    placement: "top",
    middleware: [offset(8), flip(), shift(), arrow({ element: arrowRef })],
  });

  const hover = useHover(context);
  const { getReferenceProps, getFloatingProps } = useInteractions([hover]);

  return (
    <>
      <span ref={refs.setReference} {...getReferenceProps()}>
        {children}
      </span>
      {isOpen && (
        <div
          ref={refs.setFloating}
          style={floatingStyles}
          {...getFloatingProps()}
          role="tooltip"
          className="bg-gray-900 text-white text-sm px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg shadow-lg"
        >
          {content}
          <FloatingArrow ref={arrowRef} context={context} fill="#111827" />
        </div>
      )}
    </>
  );
}

export default function App() {
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 16, padding: 48 }}>
      <Tooltip content="Save your work">
        <button>Save</button>
      </Tooltip>
      <Tooltip content="Delete this item">
        <button>Delete</button>
      </Tooltip>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Lucide React

- **Slug**: lucide-react
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: A Lucide icon library package for React applications.
- **Library**: lucide-react (lucide-react)
- **Library URL**: https://lucide.dev
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 149.7 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 21961
- **Weekly downloads**: 67070115
- **Last updated**: 2026-04
- **Tags**: Lucide, React, Feather, Icons, Icon, SVG, Feather Icons
- **Keywords**: animated icons, icon hover effect, scalable icon, colorful icons, icon grid, rotating icon, icon animation, glowing icon, icon transition, icon scale effect, icon color change, icon set, ui icons, navigation icons, action icons, toolbar icons, sidebar icons, button icons, status icons, open source icons, icon library, icon pack, 아이콘, 아이콘 라이브러리, 리액트 아이콘, 애니메이션 아이콘, SVG 아이콘, 아이콘 세트, UI 아이콘, 호버 아이콘, lucide-react, feather-icons, svg-icon-library, tree-shakeable-icons, react-icons-alternative, icon-component

### Install
```bash
bun add lucide-react
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { Sparkles, Zap, Heart, Star, Rocket, Globe, Code, Palette } from "lucide-react";

const icons = [
  { Icon: Sparkles, label: "Sparkles", color: "#f59e0b" },
  { Icon: Zap, label: "Zap", color: "#eab308" },
  { Icon: Heart, label: "Heart", color: "#ef4444" },
  { Icon: Star, label: "Star", color: "#8b5cf6" },
  { Icon: Rocket, label: "Rocket", color: "#3b82f6" },
  { Icon: Globe, label: "Globe", color: "#06b6d4" },
  { Icon: Code, label: "Code", color: "#10b981" },
  { Icon: Palette, label: "Palette", color: "#ec4899" },
];

export default function IconGrid() {
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(4, 1fr)", gap: 16, padding: 24 }}>
      {icons.map(({ Icon, label, color }) => (
        <div
          key={label}
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            flexDirection: "column",
            alignItems: "center",
            gap: 8,
            padding: 12,
            cursor: "pointer",
            transition: "transform 0.3s",
          }}
          onMouseEnter={(e) => (e.currentTarget.style.transform = "scale(1.1)")}
          onMouseLeave={(e) => (e.currentTarget.style.transform = "scale(1)")}
        >
          <Icon size={32} color={color} />
          <span style={{ fontSize: 12, opacity: 0.6 }}>{label}</span>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Tabs

- **Slug**: radix-ui-react-tabs
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Radix UI Tabs primitive with animated sliding indicator and content transitions.
- **Library**: @radix-ui/react-tabs (@radix-ui/react-tabs)
- **Library URL**: https://radix-ui.com/primitives
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 4.9 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 18692
- **Weekly downloads**: 31494174
- **Last updated**: 2026-02
- **Tags**: tabs, radix, navigation, tab-panel, ui-primitive
- **Keywords**: animated tabs, sliding indicator, tab underline animation, glowing tab bar, dark tab set, tab content fade, smooth tab transition, active tab highlight, tab panel switch, tab navigation bar, segmented control, settings tabs, dashboard tabs, content switcher, multi-panel layout, tabbed interface, page section tabs, product detail tabs, profile tabs, form step tabs, category filter tabs, 탭 메뉴, 탭 네비게이션, 애니메이션 탭, 슬라이딩 인디케이터, 탭 전환, 탭 패널, 탭 UI, 세그먼트 컨트롤, radix-ui-tabs, react-tabs, accessible-tabs, headless-tabs, aria-tabs, tab-primitives

### Install
```bash
bun add @radix-ui/react-tabs
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from "react";
import * as Tabs from "@radix-ui/react-tabs";

const tabs = [
  { value: "tab1", label: "Tab 1", content: "Content for Tab 1" },
  { value: "tab2", label: "Tab 2", content: "Content for Tab 2" },
  { value: "tab3", label: "Tab 3", content: "Content for Tab 3" },
];

export default function AnimatedTabs() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("tab1");
  const [indicatorStyle, setIndicatorStyle] = useState({ left: 0, width: 0 });
  const tabListRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!tabListRef.current) return;
    const activeEl = tabListRef.current.querySelector(
      `[data-state="active"]`
    ) as HTMLElement | null;
    if (activeEl) {
      setIndicatorStyle({ left: activeEl.offsetLeft, width: activeEl.offsetWidth });
    }
  }, [activeTab]);

  return (
    <Tabs.Root value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab}>
      <Tabs.List ref={tabListRef} style={{ display: "flex", position: "relative", borderBottom: "1px solid #333" }}>
        {tabs.map((tab) => (
          <Tabs.Trigger
            key={tab.value}
            value={tab.value}
            style={{ flex: 1, padding: "8px 16px", background: "none", border: "none", color: "#999", cursor: "pointer" }}
          >
            {tab.label}
          </Tabs.Trigger>
        ))}
        <div
          style={{
            position: "absolute",
            bottom: 0,
            height: 2,
            background: "#8b5cf6",
            transition: "all 0.3s ease",
            left: indicatorStyle.left,
            width: indicatorStyle.width,
          }}
        />
      </Tabs.List>
      {tabs.map((tab) => (
        <Tabs.Content key={tab.value} value={tab.value} style={{ padding: 16 }}>
          {tab.content}
        </Tabs.Content>
      ))}
    </Tabs.Root>
  );
}
```

---

## Rc Progress

- **Slug**: rc-progress
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Progress UI component for React with Line and Circle variants.
- **Library**: rc-progress (rc-progress)
- **Library URL**: http://github.com/react-component/progress
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 3.6 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 707
- **Weekly downloads**: 2307255
- **Last updated**: 2025-11
- **Tags**: react, react-component, react-progress, progress, loading
- **Keywords**: progress bar, circular progress, linear progress, animated progress, percentage indicator, loading bar, progress ring, gradient progress, progress animation, filling bar, completion indicator, file upload progress, download progress, task completion, loading indicator, skill level bar, storage usage, form completion, step progress, data loading, score indicator, battery indicator, 프로그레스 바, 진행률 표시, 로딩 바, 원형 프로그레스, 진행 상태, 완료율 표시, 퍼센트 표시, 로딩 인디케이터, rc-progress, progress-line, progress-circle, ant-design-progress, react-progress-bar, svg-progress

### Install
```bash
bun add rc-progress
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { Line, Circle } from "rc-progress";

export default function ProgressDemo() {
  const [percent, setPercent] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setInterval(() => {
      setPercent((p) => {
        if (p >= 85) { clearInterval(timer); return 85; }
        return p + 1;
      });
    }, 25);
    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, []);

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 32, padding: 24, alignItems: "center" }}>
      <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
        <p>Line Progress</p>
        <Line
          percent={percent}
          strokeWidth={4}
          trailWidth={4}
          strokeColor="#8b5cf6"
          trailColor="#e5e7eb"
          strokeLinecap="round"
        />
      </div>
      <div style={{ width: 120, height: 120, position: "relative" }}>
        <Circle
          percent={percent}
          strokeWidth={6}
          trailWidth={6}
          strokeColor="#8b5cf6"
          trailColor="#e5e7eb"
          strokeLinecap="round"
        />
        <span style={{ position: "absolute", inset: 0, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", fontWeight: "bold" }}>
          {percent}%
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Collapsible

- **Slug**: radix-ui-react-collapsible
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: View docs [here](https://radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/components/collapsible).
- **Library**: @radix-ui/react-collapsible (@radix-ui/react-collapsible)
- **Library URL**: https://radix-ui.com/primitives
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 3.2 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 18692
- **Weekly downloads**: 29958338
- **Last updated**: 2026-02
- **Tags**: collapsible, accordion, expand, collapse, toggle, radix
- **Keywords**: collapsible, collapsible panel, expandable section, accordion, accordion panel, expand collapse, toggle panel, fold unfold, smooth height animation, animated expand, sliding panel, height transition, content reveal, chevron rotate, FAQ section, settings panel, sidebar menu, dropdown section, disclosure widget, expandable list, collapsible card, show more content, hidden content toggle, read more section, nested menu, tree view, 접기 펼치기, 아코디언, 토글 패널, 확장 축소, 콘텐츠 접기, 드롭다운 섹션, 펼침 효과, 메뉴 토글, 섹션 확장, 리스트 접기, radix-ui, react-collapsible, CollapsibleRoot, CollapsibleTrigger, CollapsibleContent, grid-template-rows, css grid animation, headless collapsible

### Install
```bash
bun add @radix-ui/react-collapsible
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import * as Collapsible from "@radix-ui/react-collapsible";

export default function CollapsibleExample() {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);

  return (
    <Collapsible.Root open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
      <Collapsible.Trigger className="flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded-lg bg-gray-800 px-4 py-3 text-white">
        <span>Toggle Section</span>
        <svg
          width="16"
          height="16"
          viewBox="0 0 16 16"
          fill="none"
          className={`transition-transform duration-300 ${open ? "rotate-180" : ""}`}
        >
          <path d="M4 6L8 10L12 6" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" />
        </svg>
      </Collapsible.Trigger>
      {/* CSS grid trick for smooth height animation */}
      <div
        className="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out"
        style={{ gridTemplateRows: open ? "1fr" : "0fr" }}
      >
        <Collapsible.Content forceMount className="overflow-hidden">
          <p className="px-4 pt-2 pb-3 text-gray-300">
            Your collapsible content goes here. The height animates smoothly
            using the CSS grid trick (grid-template-rows: 0fr to 1fr).
          </p>
        </Collapsible.Content>
      </div>
    </Collapsible.Root>
  );
}
```

---

## Boring Avatars

- **Slug**: boring-avatars
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Boring avatars is a tiny JavaScript React library that generates custom, SVG-based, round avatars from any username and color palette.
- **Library**: boring-avatars (boring-avatars)
- **Library URL**: https://boringavatars.com/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 2.8 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 6206
- **Weekly downloads**: 184156
- **Last updated**: 2025-09
- **Tags**: avatar, gravatar, profile picture, user avatar, avatar generator, avatar placeholder
- **Keywords**: avatar, avatar generator, SVG avatar, round avatar, colorful avatar, geometric avatar, pixel avatar, marble avatar, beam avatar, sunset avatar, ring avatar, bauhaus avatar, abstract avatar, unique avatar, deterministic avatar, profile picture, user avatar, placeholder avatar, default avatar, gravatar alternative, user icon, avatar placeholder, team member avatar, comment avatar, chat avatar, anonymous avatar, identity icon, 아바타, 프로필 이미지, 사용자 아바타, 아바타 생성기, 기본 프로필, SVG 아바타, 플레이스홀더 아바타, 랜덤 아바타, 사용자 아이콘, 프로필 아이콘, boring-avatars, Avatar component, SVG generation, deterministic hash, color palette, react avatar

### Install
```bash
bun add boring-avatars
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import Avatar from "boring-avatars";

const variants = ["marble", "beam", "pixel", "sunset", "ring", "bauhaus"] as const;
const colors = ["#264653", "#2a9d8f", "#e9c46a", "#f4a261", "#e76f51"];

export default function BoringAvatarsExample() {
  const [name, setName] = useState("Jane Doe");

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4 p-8">
      <div className="flex gap-4">
        {variants.map((variant) => (
          <div key={variant} className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
            <Avatar size={48} name={name} variant={variant} colors={colors} />
            <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{variant}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
      <input
        type="text"
        value={name}
        onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}
        placeholder="Enter a name..."
        className="px-3 py-2 rounded-lg bg-gray-800 text-white border border-gray-700"
      />
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Hot Toast

- **Slug**: react-hot-toast
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Smoking hot React Notifications. Lightweight, customizable and beautiful by default.
- **Library**: react-hot-toast (react-hot-toast)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/timolins/react-hot-toast#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 4.7 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 10886
- **Weekly downloads**: 3290160
- **Last updated**: 2025-08
- **Tags**: react, notifications, toast, snackbar, alert, popup
- **Keywords**: toast notification, toast popup, notification bar, snackbar, alert toast, floating notification, stacked toast, animated toast, slide-in notification, dismiss animation, toast icon, loading toast, success toast, error toast, custom toast, form submission feedback, API response alert, action confirmation, error message display, loading indicator, save notification, undo toast, network status alert, upload progress, copy confirmation, session expiry warning, real-time update, 토스트 알림, 알림 팝업, 스낵바, 토스트 메시지, 알림 컴포넌트, 성공 알림, 에러 알림, 로딩 알림, 피드백 알림, 실시간 알림, react-hot-toast, Toaster, toast.success, toast.error, toast.loading, toast.custom, toast.promise, headless toast

### Install
```bash
bun add react-hot-toast
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { Toaster, toast } from "react-hot-toast";

export default function HotToastExample() {
  return (
    <div className="p-8">
      <Toaster
        position="top-right"
        toastOptions={{
          style: {
            background: "#1a1a2e",
            border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)",
            color: "#fff",
          },
        }}
      />
      <div className="flex gap-3">
        <button onClick={() => toast.success("Saved!")}>
          Success
        </button>
        <button onClick={() => toast.error("Error!")}>
          Error
        </button>
        <button
          onClick={() =>
            toast.promise(fetch("/api/data"), {
              loading: "Loading...",
              success: "Done!",
              error: "Failed!",
            })
          }
        >
          Loading
        </button>
        <button
          onClick={() =>
            toast.custom((t) => (
              <div className="bg-gray-800 text-white px-4 py-3 rounded-lg">
                Custom toast content
                <button onClick={() => toast.dismiss(t.id)}>Close</button>
              </div>
            ))
          }
        >
          Custom
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Use Ripple Hook

- **Library URL**: https://github.com/asplunds/use-ripple#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 1.8 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 33
- **Weekly downloads**: 6796
- **Last updated**: 2023-10
- **Tags**: useripple, use-ripple, material, ripple, react, hook
- **Keywords**: ripple effect, click ripple, material ripple, button ripple, water ripple, touch ripple, expanding circle, radial wave, ink splash, tap feedback, press animation, ripple wave, circular ripple, surface ripple, animated click, button click feedback, material design button, interactive button, touch feedback, click animation, press effect, card click effect, list item ripple, navigation tap, fab ripple, icon button feedback, menu item click, 리플 효과, 클릭 효과, 머티리얼 리플, 버튼 리플, 터치 피드백, 클릭 애니메이션, 물결 효과, 탭 피드백, 누름 효과, 잉크 효과, useRipple, use-ripple-hook, ripple hook, material-ui ripple, react ripple, css ripple

### Install
```bash
bun add use-ripple-hook
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import useRipple from "use-ripple-hook";

export default function RippleExample() {
  const [rippleRef, rippleEvent] = useRipple({
    color: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)",
  });

  return (
    <div className="flex gap-4 p-8">
      <button
        ref={rippleRef}
        onPointerDown={rippleEvent}
        className="relative overflow-hidden px-6 py-3 rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 text-white font-medium"
      >
        Click me
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```tsx
export default function LightBeamExample() {
  return <LightBeamInner />;
}
```

## Switch

- **Slug**: react-switch
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Draggable toggle-switch component for react
- **Library**: react-switch (react-switch)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/markusenglund/react-switch#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 2.5 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1340
- **Weekly downloads**: 329707
- **Last updated**: 2024-12
- **Tags**: switch, toggle, toggle-button, toggle-switch, checkbox, react, react-component
- **Keywords**: switch, toggle, toggle switch, toggle button, on off switch, draggable switch, sliding toggle, animated toggle, ios toggle, material toggle, rounded switch, pill toggle, flip switch, boolean switch, binary toggle, dark mode toggle, settings toggle, preference switch, feature flag toggle, notification toggle, form switch, enable disable switch, theme toggle, accessibility switch, mobile toggle, app settings, checkbox alternative, 토글, 스위치, 토글 스위치, 온오프 스위치, 설정 토글, 다크모드 토글, 체크박스 대체, react-switch, ReactSwitch, controlled toggle, draggable toggle component, accessible switch

### Install
```bash
bun add react-switch
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import Switch from "react-switch";

export default function ToggleExample() {
  const [checked, setChecked] = useState(false);

  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
      <Switch
        checked={checked}
        onChange={setChecked}
        onColor="#8b5cf6"
        offColor="#374151"
        handleDiameter={22}
        height={28}
        width={54}
        uncheckedIcon={false}
        checkedIcon={false}
      />
      <span>{checked ? "ON" : "OFF"}</span>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```tsx
  const [color, setColor] = useState("#8b5cf6");

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
      <HexColorPicker color={color} onChange={setColor} />
      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
        <div
          className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg border"
          style={{ backgroundColor: color }}
        />
        <span className="font-mono">{color}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```tsx
} from "react-vertical-timeline-component";

      >
        <h3 className="font-semibold">Project Launch</h3>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Initial release.</p>
      </VerticalTimelineElement>

      <VerticalTimelineElement
        contentStyle={{ background: "#f3f4f6", boxShadow: "none" }}
        date="2024 Q2"
        iconStyle={{ background: "#3b82f6", color: "#fff" }}
      >
        <h3 className="font-semibold">Feature Update</h3>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Major improvements.</p>
      </VerticalTimelineElement>
    </VerticalTimeline>
  );
}
```

## Content Loader

- **Slug**: react-content-loader
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: SVG-Powered component to easily create placeholder loadings (like Facebook cards loading)
- **Library**: react-content-loader (react-content-loader)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/danilowoz/react-content-loader
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 1.5 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 14001
- **Weekly downloads**: 716462
- **Last updated**: 2026-01
- **Tags**: react, react-native, skeleton, placeholder, loader, loading, content
- **Keywords**: skeleton, skeleton loader, content loader, placeholder loading, svg skeleton, loading placeholder, shimmer effect, pulse loading, card skeleton, text skeleton, image placeholder, loading animation, skeleton screen, ghost loading, wireframe loader, facebook card loading, feed loading, list placeholder, data fetching skeleton, lazy load placeholder, page skeleton, content placeholder, loading state, async loading UI, suspense fallback, loading indicator, preloader, 스켈레톤, 로딩 플레이스홀더, 콘텐츠 로더, 스켈레톤 로딩, 로딩 애니메이션, 데이터 로딩 UI, 플레이스홀더 효과, react-content-loader, ContentLoader, SVG placeholder, custom skeleton shapes, animated placeholder

### Install
```bash
bun add react-content-loader
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import ContentLoader from "react-content-loader";

export default function SkeletonExample() {
  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-sm p-4 rounded-xl bg-gray-100">
      <ContentLoader
        speed={2}
        width="100%"
        height={160}
        viewBox="0 0 340 160"
        backgroundColor="#e5e7eb"
        foregroundColor="#f3f4f6"
      >
        {/* Image placeholder */}
        <rect x="0" y="0" rx="8" ry="8" width="340" height="80" />
        {/* Title */}
        <rect x="0" y="96" rx="4" ry="4" width="200" height="14" />
        {/* Text lines */}
        <rect x="0" y="120" rx="3" ry="3" width="340" height="10" />
        <rect x="0" y="140" rx="3" ry="3" width="260" height="10" />
      </ContentLoader>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Hamburger React

- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Animated hamburger menu icons for React
- **Library**: hamburger-react (hamburger-react)
- **Library URL**: https://hamburger-react.netlify.app
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 2.0 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1044
- **Weekly downloads**: 62965
- **Last updated**: 2024-12
- **Tags**: hamburger, burger, menu, react, icon, icons, toggle
- **Keywords**: hamburger, hamburger icon, hamburger menu, burger menu, menu icon, animated menu icon, menu toggle, three lines icon, nav icon, hamburger animation, menu button animation, cross animation, x animation, rotate menu icon, squash animation, turn animation, mobile navigation, sidebar toggle, responsive menu, navigation toggle, mobile menu button, drawer toggle, off-canvas menu, app menu icon, header menu toggle, navbar hamburger, collapsible menu, 햄버거 메뉴, 메뉴 아이콘, 네비게이션 토글, 모바일 메뉴, 사이드바 토글, 메뉴 버튼 애니메이션, 햄버거 아이콘, hamburger-react, Squash, Turn, Rotate, Cross, animated hamburger component


### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { Squash } from "hamburger-react";

export default function HamburgerExample() {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);

  return (
    <div>
      <Squash
        toggled={isOpen}
        toggle={setIsOpen}
        size={28}
        color="#8b5cf6"
      />
      {isOpen && (
        <nav className="mt-4">
          <ul className="space-y-2">
            <li>Home</li>
            <li>About</li>
            <li>Contact</li>
          </ul>
        </nav>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Simplex Noise

- **Slug**: simplex-noise
- **Category**: background
- **Description**: simplex-noise is a fast simplex noise implementation in Javascript. Works in node and in the browser.
- **Library**: simplex-noise (simplex-noise)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/jwagner/simplex-noise.js
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 1.8 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1821
- **Weekly downloads**: 229777
- **Last updated**: 2024-07
- **Tags**: noise, random, simplex, plasma, procedural, generation, gfx
- **Keywords**: noise, grain, noise texture, grain overlay, static noise, film grain, analog grain, noise pattern, organic texture, procedural noise, noise background, grainy effect, subtle noise, animated grain, noise overlay, background texture, hero background, landing page texture, dark background noise, canvas noise, generative art, texture generation, random pattern, organic background, visual noise, perlin noise alternative, simplex algorithm, 노이즈, 노이즈 텍스처, 그레인 효과, 노이즈 배경, 필름 그레인, 노이즈 오버레이, 텍스처 생성, simplex-noise, createNoise2D, canvas 2d noise, requestAnimationFrame noise, procedural generation

### Install
```bash
bun add simplex-noise
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useRef, useEffect } from "react";
import { createNoise2D } from "simplex-noise";

export default function NoiseBackground() {
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
    if (!ctx) return;

    const noise2D = createNoise2D();
    let time = 0;
    const scale = 4;

    canvas.width = Math.floor(canvas.offsetWidth / scale);
    canvas.height = Math.floor(canvas.offsetHeight / scale);

    let animationId: number;

    function render() {
      const w = canvas!.width;
      const h = canvas!.height;
      const imageData = ctx!.createImageData(w, h);
      const data = imageData.data;

      for (let y = 0; y < h; y++) {
        for (let x = 0; x < w; x++) {
          const value = noise2D(x * 0.02 + time, y * 0.02 + time);
          const brightness = Math.floor(((value + 1) / 2) * 40 + 5);
          const idx = (y * w + x) * 4;
          data[idx] = brightness;
          data[idx + 1] = brightness;
          data[idx + 2] = brightness + 8;
          data[idx + 3] = 255;
        }
      }

      ctx!.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
      time += 0.003;
      animationId = requestAnimationFrame(render);
    }

    render();
    return () => cancelAnimationFrame(animationId);
  }, []);

  return (
    <canvas
      ref={canvasRef}
      className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full"
      style={{ imageRendering: "pixelated" }}
    />
  );
}
```

---

## Rating

- **Slug**: smastrom-react-rating
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Zero-dependency, highly customizable React rating component with SVG symbols, keyboard navigation, and accessibility built-in.
- **Library**: @smastrom/react-rating (@smastrom/react-rating)
- **Library URL**: https://reactrating.netlify.app/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 5.2 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 384
- **Weekly downloads**: 25033
- **Last updated**: 2024-06
- **Tags**: react, rating, react rating, react-rating, rating star, rating-star, rating-component
- **Keywords**: star rating, rating stars, five star rating, star component, rating display, star icons, rating indicator, star selector, rating bar, review stars, interactive stars, glowing stars, purple rating, violet stars, animated rating, product review, user feedback, satisfaction rating, app store rating, movie rating, restaurant review, score display, quality rating, customer review, feedback form, review component, rating input, 별점, 별점 컴포넌트, 리뷰 별점, 평점, 평가 컴포넌트, 별 평가, 사용자 리뷰, react-rating, @smastrom/react-rating, Rating component, SVG rating, accessible rating, keyboard rating

### Install
```bash
bun add @smastrom/react-rating
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { Rating } from "@smastrom/react-rating";
import "@smastrom/react-rating/style.css";

const purpleStyle = {
  itemShapes: (
    <path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z" />
  ),
  activeFillColor: "#8b5cf6",
  inactiveFillColor: "#1e1b4b",
};

export default function StarRating() {
  const [rating, setRating] = useState(0);

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
      <Rating
        style={{ maxWidth: 240 }}
        value={rating}
        onChange={setRating}
        itemStyles={purpleStyle}
      />
      <p className="text-sm text-white/60">
        You rated: {rating} / 5
      </p>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Wrap Balancer

- **Slug**: react-wrap-balancer
- **Category**: text
- **Description**: Simple React component that makes titles more readable.
- **Library**: react-wrap-balancer (react-wrap-balancer)
- **Library URL**: https://react-wrap-balancer.vercel.app
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 1.2 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 4213
- **Weekly downloads**: 159425
- **Last updated**: 2026-03
- **Tags**: react, wrapping, text, typography
- **Keywords**: text balancing, balanced text, balanced title, even text wrap, centered text wrap, readable title, text alignment, balanced heading, uniform text, smooth wrapping, elegant typography, clean text layout, title formatting, hero title, headline balancing, blog title, article heading, landing page heading, page title, section heading, card title, responsive title, narrow column text, ragged text fix, orphan prevention, widow prevention, 텍스트 균형, 제목 정렬, 텍스트 줄바꿈, 타이포그래피, 균형 잡힌 텍스트, 제목 레이아웃, react-wrap-balancer, Balancer component, text-wrap balance, CSS text-wrap, balanced wrapping

### Install
```bash
bun add react-wrap-balancer
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import Balancer from "react-wrap-balancer";

export default function BalancedTitle() {
  return (
    <div className="max-w-md mx-auto p-8">
      <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold">
        <Balancer>
          This long title will be balanced across
          multiple lines for better readability
        </Balancer>
      </h1>
      <p className="mt-4 text-gray-400">
        <Balancer>
          Body text can also benefit from balancing,
          especially in narrow containers or card layouts.
        </Balancer>
      </p>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Activity Calendar

- **Slug**: react-activity-calendar
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: React component to display activity data in a GitHub contribution-style calendar heatmap.
- **Library**: react-activity-calendar (react-activity-calendar)
- **Library URL**: https://grubersjoe.github.io/react-activity-calendar/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 5.7 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 562
- **Weekly downloads**: 43438
- **Last updated**: 2026-03
- **Tags**: calendar, heatmap, activity, contributions, github, data-viz
- **Keywords**: activity calendar, contribution calendar, heatmap, activity heatmap, calendar grid, heat map, contribution graph, activity grid, color coded calendar, intensity grid, activity tracker visual, green squares, contribution squares, streak display, github contributions, commit history, coding streak, habit tracker, daily activity, progress tracking, learning streak, exercise tracker, productivity tracker, user engagement, usage statistics, activity overview, 활동 캘린더, 기여 캘린더, 히트맵, 깃허브 잔디, 활동 그래프, 기여 그래프, 활동 추적, react-activity-calendar, ActivityCalendar, contribution heatmap, SVG calendar, data visualization calendar

### Install
```bash
bun add react-activity-calendar
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { ActivityCalendar } from "react-activity-calendar";

const sampleData = Array.from({ length: 365 }, (_, i) => {
  const date = new Date();
  date.setDate(date.getDate() - (365 - i));
  const level = Math.floor(Math.random() * 5) as 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4;
  return {
    date: date.toISOString().split("T")[0],
    count: level * 3,
    level,
  };
});

const purpleTheme = {
  dark: ["#161032", "#3b1d71", "#6b21a8", "#9333ea", "#c084fc"],
};

export default function ContributionCalendar() {
  return (
    <ActivityCalendar
      data={sampleData}
      theme={purpleTheme}
      colorScheme="dark"
      blockSize={12}
      blockMargin={3}
      fontSize={12}
    />
  );
}
```

---

## Usehooks

- **Slug**: uidotdev-usehooks
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: A collection of modern, server-safe React hooks -- from the ui.dev team
- **Library**: @uidotdev/usehooks (@uidotdev/usehooks)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/uidotdev/usehooks#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 4.7 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 11460
- **Weekly downloads**: 730989
- **Last updated**: 2025-05
- **Tags**: hooks, react hooks, utility, useWindowSize, usehooks
- **Keywords**: window size, viewport dimensions, screen size display, responsive indicator, live dimensions, real-time size, viewport tracker, window width, window height, responsive breakpoint, screen resolution, device size, dimension monitor, size overlay, react hooks, utility hooks, custom hooks, hook library, useWindowSize, useMediaQuery, useLocalStorage, useDebounce, useToggle, usePrevious, responsive design, media query hook, browser hooks, 리액트 훅, 유틸리티 훅, 윈도우 사이즈, 커스텀 훅, 훅 라이브러리, 반응형 훅, @uidotdev/usehooks, useWindowSize hook, react custom hooks, server-safe hooks, SSR-safe hooks

### Install
```bash
bun add @uidotdev/usehooks
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useWindowSize } from "@uidotdev/usehooks";

export default function WindowSizeDisplay() {
  const { width, height } = useWindowSize();

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4 p-8">
      <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white/80">
        Window Size
      </h2>
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center bg-white/5 rounded-lg px-6 py-4">
          <span className="text-sm text-white/50">Width</span>
          <span className="text-3xl font-bold text-violet-400">
            {width ?? "--"}
          </span>
        </div>
        <span className="text-white/30 text-xl">&times;</span>
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center bg-white/5 rounded-lg px-6 py-4">
          <span className="text-sm text-white/50">Height</span>
          <span className="text-3xl font-bold text-violet-400">
            {height ?? "--"}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Dialog

- **Slug**: radix-ui-react-dialog
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: View docs [here](https://radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/components/dialog).
- **Library**: @radix-ui/react-dialog (@radix-ui/react-dialog)
- **Library URL**: https://radix-ui.com/primitives
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 10.6 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 18692
- **Weekly downloads**: 36646230
- **Last updated**: 2026-02
- **Tags**: dialog, modal, overlay, popup, radix
- **Keywords**: modal dialog, overlay popup, animated modal, fade in modal, scale animation modal, dark modal, centered dialog, backdrop overlay, floating dialog, glass modal, slide up modal, dimmed background modal, confirmation dialog, form modal, login modal, settings dialog, alert dialog, popup form, data entry modal, notification modal, consent dialog, file upload modal, detail view modal, 모달 다이얼로그, 팝업 창, 오버레이 모달, 확인 대화상자, 폼 모달, 알림 팝업, 설정 다이얼로그, radix-dialog, react-dialog, dialog-primitive, accessible-modal, aria-dialog, portal-modal

### Install
```bash
bun add @radix-ui/react-dialog
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import * as Dialog from "@radix-ui/react-dialog";

export default function DialogExample() {
  return (
    <Dialog.Root>
      <Dialog.Trigger asChild>
        <button className="px-4 py-2 bg-violet-600 text-white rounded-lg">
          Open Dialog
        </button>
      </Dialog.Trigger>

      <Dialog.Portal>
        <Dialog.Overlay className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" />
        <Dialog.Content className="fixed top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[90vw] max-w-md bg-gray-900 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-xl">
          <Dialog.Title className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">
            Edit Profile
          </Dialog.Title>
          <Dialog.Description className="text-sm text-white/50 mt-1">
            Make changes to your profile here.
          </Dialog.Description>

          <div className="mt-4 space-y-3">
            <input
              placeholder="Name"
              className="w-full h-10 rounded-lg bg-white/5 border border-white/10 px-3 text-white text-sm"
            />
            <input
              placeholder="Email"
              className="w-full h-10 rounded-lg bg-white/5 border border-white/10 px-3 text-white text-sm"
            />
          </div>

          <div className="mt-5 flex justify-end gap-3">
            <Dialog.Close asChild>
              <button className="px-4 py-2 text-sm text-white/60 hover:text-white">
                Cancel
              </button>
            </Dialog.Close>
            <Dialog.Close asChild>
              <button className="px-4 py-2 bg-violet-600 text-white text-sm rounded-lg">
                Save
              </button>
            </Dialog.Close>
          </div>

          <Dialog.Close asChild>
            <button className="absolute top-4 right-4 text-white/40 hover:text-white" aria-label="Close">
              ✕
            </button>
          </Dialog.Close>
        </Dialog.Content>
      </Dialog.Portal>
    </Dialog.Root>
  );
}
```

## Core

- **Slug**: dnd-kit-core
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: dnd kit – a lightweight React library for building performant and accessible drag and drop experiences
- **Library**: @dnd-kit/core (@dnd-kit/core)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/clauderic/dnd-kit#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 13.9 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 16913
- **Weekly downloads**: 11367106
- **Last updated**: 2026-04
- **Tags**: drag, drop, sortable, reorder, dnd
- **Keywords**: drag and drop, sortable list, draggable items, reorderable list, vertical sort, drag handle, drop zone, drag indicator, smooth drag, animated reorder, drag overlay, sortable cards, task reorder, kanban board, priority list, playlist reorder, file organizer, todo reorder, menu builder, form field reorder, layer ordering, image gallery sort, dashboard widget reorder, 드래그 앤 드롭, 정렬 가능 목록, 드래그 리스트, 순서 변경, 재정렬, 칸반 보드, 드래그 카드, dnd-kit, useSortable, SortableContext, DndContext, closestCenter, arrayMove

### Install
```bash
bun add @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { DndContext, closestCenter, type DragEndEvent } from "@dnd-kit/core";
import {
  arrayMove,
  SortableContext,
  useSortable,
  verticalListSortingStrategy,
} from "@dnd-kit/sortable";
import { CSS } from "@dnd-kit/utilities";

function SortableItem({ id, label }: { id: string; label: string }) {
  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition } =
    useSortable({ id });

  const style = {
    transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
    transition,
  };

  return (
    <div
      ref={setNodeRef}
      style={style}
      {...attributes}
      {...listeners}
      className="px-4 py-3 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg cursor-grab text-white"
    >
      {label}
    </div>
  );
}

const initialItems = [
  { id: "1", label: "Item A" },
  { id: "2", label: "Item B" },
  { id: "3", label: "Item C" },
];

export default function DndExample() {
  const [items, setItems] = useState(initialItems);

  function handleDragEnd(event: DragEndEvent) {
    const { active, over } = event;
    if (over && active.id !== over.id) {
      setItems((prev) => {
        const oldIdx = prev.findIndex((i) => i.id === active.id);
        const newIdx = prev.findIndex((i) => i.id === over.id);
        return arrayMove(prev, oldIdx, newIdx);
      });
    }
  }

  return (
    <DndContext collisionDetection={closestCenter} onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}>
      <SortableContext items={items.map((i) => i.id)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>
        <div className="space-y-2 max-w-xs mx-auto">
          {items.map((item) => (
            <SortableItem key={item.id} id={item.id} label={item.label} />
          ))}
        </div>
      </SortableContext>
    </DndContext>
  );
}
```

---

## Slider

- **Slug**: radix-ui-react-slider
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: View docs [here](https://radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/components/slider).
- **Library**: @radix-ui/react-slider (@radix-ui/react-slider)
- **Library URL**: https://radix-ui.com/primitives
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 5.1 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 18692
- **Weekly downloads**: 25532749
- **Last updated**: 2026-02
- **Tags**: slider, range, input, control, radix
- **Keywords**: range slider, slider control, dual range slider, purple slider, dark slider, track and thumb, slider bar, value slider, gradient slider, smooth slider, draggable slider, animated thumb, price range filter, volume control, brightness slider, opacity slider, zoom level, date range picker, age filter, color temperature, playback position, budget range, size selector, distance filter, 슬라이더, 범위 슬라이더, 레인지 슬라이더, 가격 필터, 볼륨 조절, 값 조절기, 범위 선택, radix-slider, react-slider, slider-primitive, accessible-slider, aria-slider, range-input

### Install
```bash
bun add @radix-ui/react-slider
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import * as Slider from "@radix-ui/react-slider";

export default function SliderExample() {
  const [value, setValue] = useState([50]);
  const [range, setRange] = useState([25, 75]);

  return (
    <div className="space-y-8 max-w-sm mx-auto p-6">
      {/* Single slider */}
      <div>
        <p className="text-sm text-white/60 mb-2">Volume: {value[0]}%</p>
        <Slider.Root
          className="relative flex items-center select-none touch-none w-full h-5"
          value={value}
          onValueChange={setValue}
          max={100}
        >
          <Slider.Track className="relative grow rounded-full h-1.5 bg-white/10">
            <Slider.Range className="absolute rounded-full h-full bg-violet-500" />
          </Slider.Track>
          <Slider.Thumb className="block w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-violet-500 border-2 border-violet-300 shadow-md" />
        </Slider.Root>
      </div>

      {/* Dual range slider */}
      <div>
        <p className="text-sm text-white/60 mb-2">
          Range: {range[0]} - {range[1]}
        </p>
        <Slider.Root
          className="relative flex items-center select-none touch-none w-full h-5"
          value={range}
          onValueChange={setRange}
          max={100}
          minStepsBetweenThumbs={5}
        >
          <Slider.Track className="relative grow rounded-full h-1.5 bg-white/10">
            <Slider.Range className="absolute rounded-full h-full bg-violet-500" />
          </Slider.Track>
          <Slider.Thumb className="block w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-violet-500 border-2 border-violet-300" />
          <Slider.Thumb className="block w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-violet-500 border-2 border-violet-300" />
        </Slider.Root>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Responsive Masonry

- **Slug**: react-responsive-masonry
- **Category**: layout
- **Description**: React responsive masonry component built with css flexbox
- **Library**: react-responsive-masonry (react-responsive-masonry)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/cedricdelpoux/react-responsive-masonry#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 1.6 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 450
- **Weekly downloads**: 317562
- **Last updated**: 2025-04
- **Tags**: masonry, grid, layout, responsive, flexbox
- **Keywords**: masonry grid, pinterest layout, waterfall grid, staggered grid, responsive masonry, card masonry, dynamic grid, uneven grid, multi-column layout, flexbox masonry, auto-fit grid, cascading layout, photo gallery, image wall, portfolio grid, blog card layout, product showcase, media gallery, tile layout, content grid, dashboard cards, social feed layout, article cards, pin board, 메이슨리 그리드, 핀터레스트 레이아웃, 워터폴 그리드, 반응형 그리드, 카드 레이아웃, 갤러리 그리드, 타일 레이아웃, react-masonry, responsive-masonry, css-flexbox-masonry, masonry-component, column-layout, breakpoint-masonry

### Install
```bash
bun add react-responsive-masonry
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import Masonry, { ResponsiveMasonry } from "react-responsive-masonry";

const items = [
  { height: 150, title: "Card A" },
  { height: 220, title: "Card B" },
  { height: 130, title: "Card C" },
  { height: 190, title: "Card D" },
  { height: 160, title: "Card E" },
  { height: 200, title: "Card F" },
];

export default function MasonryExample() {
  return (
    <ResponsiveMasonry columnsCountBreakPoints={{ 350: 1, 750: 2, 900: 3 }}>
      <Masonry gutter="12px">
        {items.map((item, i) => (
          <div
            key={i}
            className="rounded-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 p-4"
            style={{ height: item.height }}
          >
            <h3 className="text-white font-medium">{item.title}</h3>
          </div>
        ))}
      </Masonry>
    </ResponsiveMasonry>
  );
}
```

## Tippy.js React

- **Slug**: tippyjs-react
- **Category**: hover
- **Description**: React component for Tippy.js — the complete tooltip, popover, dropdown, and menu solution
- **Library**: @tippyjs/react (@tippyjs/react)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/atomiks/tippyjs-react#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 13.7 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1813
- **Weekly downloads**: 929847
- **Last updated**: 2024-05
- **Tags**: tooltip, popover, tippy, hover, dropdown
- **Keywords**: tooltip popup, hover tooltip, animated tooltip, floating tooltip, dark tooltip, tooltip arrow, popover bubble, info tooltip, scale tooltip, shift tooltip, perspective tooltip, tooltip animation, button tooltip, icon hint, form field help, navigation tooltip, action description, feature hint, context tooltip, label tooltip, abbreviation tooltip, status tooltip, truncated text tooltip, onboarding tooltip, 툴팁, 팝오버, 호버 툴팁, 말풍선, 도움말 팝업, 힌트 메시지, 안내 툴팁, tippyjs, tippy-react, tooltip-component, popperjs, floating-ui-tooltip, accessible-tooltip

### Install
```bash

```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import Tippy from "@tippyjs/react";
import "tippy.js/dist/tippy.css";
import "tippy.js/animations/shift-away.css";
import "tippy.js/animations/scale.css";
import "tippy.js/animations/perspective.css";

export default function TooltipExample() {
  return (
    <div className="flex gap-4 p-8">
      <Tippy content="Shift away animation" animation="shift-away">
        <button className="px-4 py-2 bg-violet-600 text-white rounded-lg">
          Shift Away
        </button>
      </Tippy>

      <Tippy content="Scale animation" animation="scale">
        <button className="px-4 py-2 bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded-lg">
          Scale
        </button>
      </Tippy>

      <Tippy content="Perspective animation" animation="perspective">
        <button className="px-4 py-2 bg-amber-600 text-white rounded-lg">
          Perspective
        </button>
      </Tippy>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Circular Progressbar

- **Slug**: react-circular-progressbar
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: A circular progress indicator component with customizable styles, colors, and animations. Perfect for dashboards and stats displays.
- **Library**: react-circular-progressbar (react-circular-progressbar)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/kevinsqi/react-circular-progressbar#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 1.7 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1115
- **Weekly downloads**: 436031
- **Last updated**: 2025-02
- **Tags**: progressbar, react, react-component, svg, circular, dashboard
- **Keywords**: circular progress, circular progressbar, round progress, radial progress, donut chart, ring indicator, progress ring, circular gauge, arc progress, animated progress, percentage circle, progress wheel, dashboard stats, loading indicator, upload progress, skill level, completion rate, score display, storage usage, cpu usage, battery level, download progress, task completion, goal tracker, 원형 프로그레스바, 원형 게이지, 진행률 표시, 대시보드 차트, 원형 차트, 진행 상태, 로딩 인디케이터, react-circular-progressbar, CircularProgressbar, buildStyles, svg progress, progress component

### Install
```bash
bun add react-circular-progressbar
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import {
  CircularProgressbar,
  buildStyles,
} from "react-circular-progressbar";
import "react-circular-progressbar/dist/styles.css";

export default function CircularProgressExample() {
  const [value, setValue] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    const timeout = setTimeout(() => setValue(72), 300);
    return () => clearTimeout(timeout);
  }, []);

  return (
    <div style={{ width: 120, height: 120 }}>
      <CircularProgressbar
        value={value}
        text={`${value}%`}
        styles={buildStyles({
          textSize: "18px",
          pathTransitionDuration: 1.5,
          pathColor: "#8b5cf6",
          textColor: "#fff",
          trailColor: "rgba(139,92,246,0.15)",
        })}
      />
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Prism React Renderer

- **Slug**: prism-react-renderer
- **Category**: text
- **Description**: Renders highlighted Prism output using React. Beautiful syntax highlighting for code blocks with multiple built-in themes.
- **Library**: prism-react-renderer (prism-react-renderer)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/FormidableLabs/prism-react-renderer#readme
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 25.4 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1996
- **Weekly downloads**: 3127799
- **Last updated**: 2025-01
- **Tags**: syntax-highlighting, code, prism, react, theme
- **Keywords**: syntax highlighting, code highlighting, code block, code snippet, colored code, dark code theme, night owl theme, dracula theme, code display, highlighted code, formatted code, pretty code, documentation code, blog code block, tutorial code, api reference, code example, code preview, developer blog, technical writing, code showcase, readme code, markdown code block, code editor display, 구문 강조, 코드 하이라이팅, 코드 블록, 코드 표시, 코드 테마, 문법 강조, 코드 미리보기, prism-react-renderer, Highlight, themes.nightOwl, themes.dracula, PrismJS, tokenize

### Install
```bash
bun add prism-react-renderer
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { Highlight, themes } from "prism-react-renderer";

const code = `function greet(name: string) {
  return \`Hello, \${name}!\`;
}`;

export default function CodeBlock() {
  return (
    <Highlight theme={themes.nightOwl} code={code} language="tsx">
      {({ style, tokens, getLineProps, getTokenProps }) => (
        <pre style={{ ...style, padding: "16px", borderRadius: "8px" }}>
          {tokens.map((line, i) => (
            <div key={i} {...getLineProps({ line })}>
              {line.map((token, key) => (
                <span key={key} {...getTokenProps({ token })} />
              ))}
            </div>
          ))}
        </pre>
      )}
    </Highlight>
  );
}
```

---

## Yet Another React Lightbox

- **Slug**: yet-another-react-lightbox
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Modern React lightbox component with smooth slide animations, swipe gestures, and fullscreen support.
- **Library**: yet-another-react-lightbox (yet-another-react-lightbox)
- **Library URL**: https://yet-another-react-lightbox.com
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 12.0 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 1236
- **Weekly downloads**: 310484
- **Last updated**: 2026-03
- **Tags**: react, image, photo, lightbox, gallery, modal
- **Keywords**: image lightbox, photo lightbox, fullscreen gallery, image modal, photo viewer, slide viewer, image carousel, gallery overlay, image popup, zoom image, pan image, swipe gallery, portfolio gallery, product images, photo album, image preview, media gallery, thumbnail grid, e-commerce gallery, photography portfolio, art showcase, image browser, photo slideshow, media viewer, 이미지 라이트박스, 사진 갤러리, 이미지 뷰어, 사진 확대, 갤러리 모달, 이미지 팝업, 사진 슬라이드, yet-another-react-lightbox, Lightbox, slides, lightbox plugin, yarl, react lightbox component

### Install
```bash
bun add yet-another-react-lightbox
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import Lightbox from "yet-another-react-lightbox";
import "yet-another-react-lightbox/styles.css";

const slides = [
  { src: "/images/photo-1.jpg" },
  { src: "/images/photo-2.jpg" },
  { src: "/images/photo-3.jpg" },
];

export default function GalleryLightbox() {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  const [index, setIndex] = useState(0);

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
        {slides.map((slide, i) => (
          <img
            key={i}
            src={slide.src}
            alt=""
            className="cursor-pointer rounded-lg"
            onClick={() => {
              setIndex(i);
              setOpen(true);
            }}
          />
        ))}
      </div>

      <Lightbox
        open={open}
        close={() => setOpen(false)}
        index={index}
        slides={slides}
      />
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Rc Steps

- **Slug**: rc-steps
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Steps UI component for React. Build step-by-step wizards, onboarding flows, and progress trackers.
- **Library**: rc-steps (rc-steps)
- **Library URL**: http://github.com/react-component/steps
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 3.4 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 332
- **Weekly downloads**: 2110114
- **Last updated**: 2025-11
- **Tags**: react, react-component, react-steps, stepper, wizard
- **Keywords**: stepper, step indicator, progress steps, step wizard, step navigation, numbered steps, step tracker, step bar, horizontal stepper, vertical stepper, step dots, step connector, onboarding flow, checkout wizard, form wizard, multi-step form, setup wizard, registration flow, progress tracker, workflow steps, pipeline status, order tracking, tutorial steps, guided tour, 단계 표시기, 스텝퍼, 진행 단계, 마법사 UI, 단계별 폼, 온보딩 흐름, 워크플로우 단계, rc-steps, Steps, Steps.Step, current step, step status, ant-design steps

### Install
```bash
bun add rc-steps
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import Steps from "rc-steps";
import "rc-steps/assets/index.css";

const items = [
  { title: "Step 1", description: "First" },
  { title: "Step 2", description: "Second" },
  { title: "Step 3", description: "Third" },
];

export default function StepperExample() {
  const [current, setCurrent] = useState(0);

  return (
    <div>
      <Steps current={current} items={items} />
      <div style={{ marginTop: 16, display: "flex", gap: 8 }}>
        <button
          onClick={() => setCurrent((c) => Math.max(0, c - 1))}
          disabled={current === 0}
        >
          Prev
        </button>
        <button
          onClick={() => setCurrent((c) => Math.min(items.length - 1, c + 1))}
          disabled={current === items.length - 1}
        >
          Next
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## Copy To Clipboard

- **Slug**: react-copy-to-clipboard
- **Category**: interaction
- **Description**: Copy-to-clipboard React component with callback support. Perfect for code snippets, API keys, and share links.
- **Library**: react-copy-to-clipboard (react-copy-to-clipboard)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/nkbt/react-copy-to-clipboard
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 2.5 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 2371
- **Weekly downloads**: 1993520
- **Last updated**: 2026-03
- **Tags**: component, react-component, react, copy to clipboard, clipboard
- **Keywords**: copy button, clipboard copy, copy animation, copied feedback, copy icon, copy indicator, click to copy, one-click copy, copy text, copy snippet, copy code, copy confirmation, code snippet copy, api key copy, share link copy, invite code, referral link, command copy, install command, embed code, color hex copy, address copy, token copy, url shortener, 클립보드 복사, 복사 버튼, 텍스트 복사, 코드 복사, 복사 애니메이션, 원클릭 복사, 링크 복사, react-copy-to-clipboard, CopyToClipboard, navigator.clipboard, execCommand copy, clipboard API, onCopy callback

### Install
```bash
bun add react-copy-to-clipboard @types/react-copy-to-clipboard
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { CopyToClipboard } from "react-copy-to-clipboard";

export default function CopyExample() {
  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);
  const text = "bun add react-copy-to-clipboard";

  const handleCopy = () => {
    setCopied(true);
    setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000);
  };

  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }}>
      <code>{text}</code>
      <CopyToClipboard text={text} onCopy={handleCopy}>
        <button>{copied ? "Copied!" : "Copy"}</button>
      </CopyToClipboard>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Animate Height

- **Slug**: react-animate-height
- **Category**: transition
- **Description**: Lightweight React component for animating height using CSS transitions. Perfect for accordions, expandable panels, and collapsible content.
- **Library**: react-animate-height (react-animate-height)
- **Library URL**: https://github.com/Stanko/react-animate-height
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 1.8 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 763
- **Weekly downloads**: 414222
- **Last updated**: 2023-11
- **Tags**: transition, height, accordion, collapse, expand, animation
- **Keywords**: animate height, height transition, smooth expand, smooth collapse, slide down, slide up, expand animation, collapse animation, height animation, auto height, dynamic height, grow shrink, accordion, collapsible panel, expandable section, faq section, dropdown content, toggle content, show more, read more, expandable card, nested menu, settings panel, form section, 높이 애니메이션, 아코디언, 접히는 패널, 확장 애니메이션, 슬라이드 다운, 토글 컨텐츠, 펼치기 접기, css transition, zero dependency, react-animate-height, lightweight, 1.8kb

### Install
```bash
bun add react-animate-height
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";
import { useState } from "react";
import AnimateHeight from "react-animate-height";

export default function Accordion() {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);

  return (
    <div>
      <button onClick={() => setOpen(!open)}>
        {open ? "Collapse" : "Expand"}
      </button>
      <AnimateHeight duration={300} height={open ? "auto" : 0}>
        <p>This content smoothly expands and collapses.</p>
      </AnimateHeight>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```tsx
import { Tooltip } from "react-tooltip";

export default function Example() {

    <>
      <button data-tooltip-id="my-tip" data-tooltip-content="Hello!">
        Hover me
      </button>
      <Tooltip id="my-tip" place="top" />
    </>
  );
}
```

## Resizable Panels

- **Slug**: react-resizable-panels

- **Description**: <img src="https://react-resizable-panels.vercel.app/og.png" alt="react-resizable-panels logo" width="400" height="210" />
- **Library**: react-resizable-panels (react-resizable-panels)
- **Library URL**: https://react-resizable-panels.vercel.app/
- **Install type**: npm
- **Bundle size**: 10.4 kB
- **GitHub stars**: 5208
- **Weekly downloads**: 21704046
- **Last updated**: 2026-04
- **Tags**: react, resizable, panels, split, layout, drag, resize
- **Keywords**: resizable panels, split pane, draggable divider, panel layout, adjustable columns, flexible grid, collapsible sidebar, split view, panel resize handle, horizontal split, vertical split, nested panels, responsive panels, dynamic layout, panel group, IDE layout, code editor panels, dashboard layout, file explorer sidebar, inspector panel, settings layout, email client layout, admin panel layout, multi-pane editor, workspace layout, dev tools panels, 리사이즈 패널, 분할 레이아웃, 패널 크기 조절, 드래그 분할, 사이드바 레이아웃, 패널 그룹, 유연한 레이아웃, react-resizable-panels, PanelGroup, PanelResizeHandle, Panel, split-pane component

### Install
```bash
bun add react-resizable-panels
```

### Usage
```tsx
"use client";

import { Panel, PanelGroup, PanelResizeHandle } from "react-resizable-panels";

export default function ResizablePanelsExample() {
  return (
    <PanelGroup direction="horizontal" className="h-screen">
      <Panel defaultSize={25} minSize={10}>
        <div className="h-full p-4 bg-gray-900">
          <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-400">Sidebar</h2>
        </div>
      </Panel>

      <PanelResizeHandle className="w-1 bg-gray-700 hover:bg-blue-500 transition-colors" />

      <Panel defaultSize={50} minSize={20}>
        <div className="h-full p-4 bg-gray-950">
          <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-400">Main Content</h2>
        </div>
      </Panel>

      <PanelResizeHandle className="w-1 bg-gray-700 hover:bg-blue-500 transition-colors" />

      <Panel defaultSize={25} minSize={10}>
        <div className="h-full p-4 bg-gray-900">
          <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-400">Inspector</h2>
        </div>
      </Panel>
    </PanelGroup>
  );
}
```
